hash-based routing\n        window.addEventListener('hashchange', () => {\n            this.handleHashChange();\n        });\n    }\n\n    handleHashChange() {\n        const hash = window.location.hash || '#dashboard';\n\n        // Hide all pages\n        this.hideAllPages();\n\n        // Update active nav link\n        document.querySelectorAll('.nav-link').forEach(link => {\n            link.classList.remove('active');\n        });\n\n        const activeLink = document.querySelector(`.nav-link[href=\"${hash}\"]`);\n        if (activeLink) {\n            activeLink.classList.add('active');\n        }\n\n        // Show the appropriate page\n        if (hash === '#dashboard') {\n            this.showDashboard();\n        } else if (hash === '#comparison') {\n            this.showComparisonView();\n        }\n    }\n\n    hideAllPages() {\n        // Hide all page containers\n        const pages = document.querySelectorAll('.page');\n        pages.forEach(page => {\n            page.style.display = 'none';\n        });\n    }\n\n    showDashboard() {\n        const dashboardPage = document.getElementById('dashboard-page');\n        const emptyState = document.getElementById('dashboard-empty-state');\n\n        if (dashboardPage && emptyState) {\n            if (this.datasetId) {\n                dashboardPage.style.display = 'block';\n                emptyState.style.display = 'none';\n            } else {\n                dashboardPage.style.display = 'none';\n                emptyState.style.display = 'block';\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Load statistics if dataset is loaded\n        if (this.datasetId) {\n            this.loadStatistics();\n        }\n    }\n\n    showComparisonView() {\n        const comparisonPage = document.getElementById('comparison-page');\n        const emptyState = document.getElementById('comparison-empty-state');\n\n        if (comparisonPage && emptyState) {\n            if (this.datasetId) {\n                comparisonPage.style.display = 'block';\n                emptyState.style.display = 'none';\n                // Load classes for filter\n                this.loadClassesForFilter();\n                // Load images list\n                this.loadImagesList();\n            } else {\n                comparisonPage.style.display = 'none';\n                emptyState.style.display = 'block';\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    async loadClassesForFilter() {\n        if (!this.datasetId) return;\n\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch(`/api/statistics/${this.datasetId}`);\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n            if (data.success && data.classes) {\n                this.allClasses = data.classes;\n                this.updateClassFilterDropdown();\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error loading classes for filter:', error);\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateClassFilterDropdown() {\n        const classFilter = document.getElementById('class-filter');\n        if (!classFilter) return;\n\n        // Clear existing options except the first one\n        while (classFilter.options.length > 1) {\n            classFilter.remove(1);\n        }\n\n        // Add class options\n        this.allClasses.forEach(cls => {\n            const option = document.createElement('option');\n            option.value = cls.name;\n            option.textContent = cls.name;\n            classFilter.appendChild(option);\n        });\n    }\n\n    async loadImagesList() {\n        if (!this.datasetId) return;\n\n        try {\n            // Build URL with filter parameters (class and status filters are server-side)\n            let url = `/api/images/${this.datasetId}?per_page=50`;\n\n            if (this.filters.classFilter) {\n                url += `&class_filter=${encodeURIComponent(this.filters.classFilter)}`;\n            }\n\n            if (this.filters.statusFilter) {\n                url += `&status_filter=${encodeURIComponent(this.filters.statusFilter)}`;\n            }\n\n            const response = await fetch(url);\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n            if (data.images) {\n                this.allImages = data.images;\n                this.applyClientSideFilters();\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error loading images list:', error);\n            const container = document.getElementById('image-list-container');\n            if (container) {\n                container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-danger py-5\">Failed to load images</div>';\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    applyClientSideFilters() {\n        if (!this.allImages) return;\n\n        let filteredImages = [...this.allImages];\n\n        // Apply search filter (client-side)\n        if (this.filters.search) {\n            const searchTerm = this.filters.search.toLowerCase();\n            filteredImages = filteredImages.filter(image =>\n                image.filename.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)\n            );\n        }\n\n        // Render filtered images\n        this.renderImagesList(filteredImages);\n    }\n\n    renderImagesList(images) {\n        const container = document.getElementById('image-list-container');\n        if (!container) return;\n\n        if (!images || images.length === 0) {\n            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-muted py-5\">No images found</div>';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        container.innerHTML = images.map(image => {\n            const statusClass = image.is_perfect ? 'status-perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'status-warning' : 'status-perfect');\n            return `\n                <div class=\"image-list-item\" data-image-id=\"${image.id}\">\n                    <img src=\"${image.thumbnail_path || ''}\" alt=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\" class=\"thumbnail\" onerror=\"this.src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%2260%22 height=%2260%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%23e2e8f0%22 width=%22100%25%22 height=%22100%25%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%2394a3b8%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22 dy=%22.3em%22%3E%3F%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E'\">\n                    <div class=\"image-info\">\n                        <div class=\"filename\">${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}</div>\n                        <div class=\"image-stats\">\n                            GT: ${image.total_gt_boxes} | Pred: ${image.total_pred_boxes}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    <span class=\"status-dot ${statusClass}\" title=\"${image.is_perfect ? 'Perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'Has errors' : 'Good')}\"></span>\n                </div>\n            `;\n        }).join('');\n\n        // Add click event listeners to image list items\n        container.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(item => {\n            item.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                const imageId = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n                this.selectImage(imageId);\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    updateImagesList(images) {\n        // Store images and apply client-side filters\n        this.allImages = images;\n        this.applyClientSideFilters();\n    }\n\n    updateImagesList(images) {\n        const container = document.getElementById('image-list-container');\n        if (!container) return;\n\n        if (!images || images.length === 0) {\n            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-muted py-5\">No images found</div>';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // Store all images for client-side filtering\n        this.allImages = images;\n\n        // Apply client-side search filter (if needed)\n        let filteredImages = images;\n        if (this.filters.search) {\n            const searchTerm = this.filters.search.toLowerCase();\n            filteredImages = images.filter(image =>\n                image.filename.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)\n            );\n        }\n\n        // Update container with filtered images\n        if (filteredImages.length === 0) {\n            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-muted py-5\">No images match your search criteria</div>';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        container.innerHTML = filteredImages.map(image => {\n            const statusClass = image.is_perfect ? 'status-perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'status-warning' : 'status-perfect');\n            return `\n                <div class=\"image-list-item\" data-image-id=\"${image.id}\">\n                    <img src=\"${image.thumbnail_path || ''}\" alt=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\" class=\"thumbnail\" onerror=\"this.src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%2260%22 height=%2260%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%23e2e8f0%22 width=%22100%25%22 height=%22100%25%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%2394a3b8%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22 dy=%22.3em%22%3E%3F%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E'\">\n                    <div class=\"image-info\">\n                        <div class=\"filename\">${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}</div>\n                        <div class=\"image-stats\">\n                            GT: ${image.total_gt_boxes} | Pred: ${image.total_pred_boxes}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    <span class=\"status-dot ${statusClass}\" title=\"${image.is_perfect ? 'Perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'Has errors' : 'Good')}\"></span>\n                </div>\n            `;\n        }).join('');\n\n        // Add click event listeners to image list items\n        container.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(item => {\n            item.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                const imageId = parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n                this.selectImage(imageId);\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    async selectImage(imageId) {\n        if (!this.datasetId) return;\n\n        this.currentImageId = imageId;\n\n        // Update active state in list\n        document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item').forEach(item => {\n            item.classList.remove('active');\n            if (parseInt(item.getAttribute('data-image-id')) === imageId) {\n                item.classList.add('active');\n            }\n        });\n\n        // Load image details\n        await this.loadImageDetail(imageId);\n    }\n\n    async loadImageDetail(imageId) {\n        if (!this.datasetId) return;\n\n        const detailContent = document.getElementById('image-detail-content');\n        if (detailContent) {\n            detailContent.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center py-5\"><i class=\"fas fa-spinner fa-spin fa-2x mb-3\"></i><p>Loading image details...</p></div>';\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch(`/api/images/${this.datasetId}/${imageId}`);\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n            if (data.success) {\n                this.updateImageDetail(data);\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Error loading image detail:', error);\n            if (detailContent) {\n                detailContent.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-danger py-5\">Failed to load image details</div>';\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateImageDetail(data) {\n        const detailContent = document.getElementById('image-detail-content');\n        if (!detailContent) return;\n\n        // Calculate total boxes\n        const totalGT = data.ground_truth_boxes ? data.ground_truth_boxes.length : 0;\n        const totalPred = data.prediction_boxes ? data.prediction_boxes.length : 0;\n\n        // Build per-class stats table rows\n        const classStatsRows = Object.entries(data.per_class_stats || {}).map(([className, stats]) => `\n            <tr>\n                <td>${this.escapeHtml(className)}</td>\n                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.gt_count || 0}</td>\n                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.pred_count || 0}</td>\n                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.tp || 0}</td>\n                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.fp || 0}</td>\n                <td class=\"text-center\">${stats.fn || 0}</td>\n            </tr>\n        `).join('');\n\n        detailContent.innerHTML = `\n            <div class=\"image-header-section\">\n                <div class=\"d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mb-3\">\n                    <div>\n                        <h5 class=\"mb-1\"><i class=\"fas fa-image me-2\"></i>${this.escapeHtml(data.filename)}</h5>\n                        <p class=\"mb-0 text-muted\">\n                            <small>${data.dimensions ? `${data.dimensions.width} x ${data.dimensions.height} pixels` : ''}</small>\n                        </p>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"d-flex gap-2\">\n                        <button class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" id=\"prev-image-btn\">\n                            <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-left me-1\"></i> Previous\n                        </button>\n                        <button class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" id=\"next-image-btn\">\n                            Next <i class=\"fas fa-chevron-right ms-1\"></i>\n                        </button>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n                <div class=\"d-flex gap-3\">\n                    <span class=\"badge bg-primary\">GT: ${totalGT}</span>\n                    <span class=\"badge bg-info\">Pred: ${totalPred}</span>\n                </div>\n\n                <!-- Box Visibility Toggles -->\n                <div class=\"d-flex gap-2 mb-3 mt-3\">\n                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-gt-boxes\" title=\"Show/Hide Ground Truth Boxes\">\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-check-square me-1\"></i> GT Boxes\n                    </button>\n                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-pred-boxes\" title=\"Show/Hide Prediction Boxes\">\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-crosshairs me-1\"></i> Pred Boxes\n                    </button>\n                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm toggle-btn active\" id=\"toggle-labels\" title=\"Show/Hide Labels\">\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-tag me-1\"></i> Labels\n                    </button>\n                </div>\n\n                <!-- Zoom Controls -->\n                <div class=\"d-flex gap-2 mb-3\">\n                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm zoom-btn\" id=\"zoom-out\" title=\"Zoom Out\">\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-search-minus\"></i>\n                    </button>\n                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm zoom-btn\" id=\"zoom-reset\" title=\"Reset Zoom\">\n                        <span id=\"zoom-level-display\">100%</span>\n                    </button>\n                    <button class=\"btn btn-sm zoom-btn\" id=\"zoom-in\" title=\"Zoom In\">\n                        <i class=\"fas fa-search-plus\"></i>\n                    </button>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n\n            <div class=\"image-display-section\">\n                <div class=\"card\">\n                    <div class=\"card-body p-0\">\n                        <div class=\"canvas-container\" id=\"canvas-container\">\n                            <canvas id=\"image-canvas\"></canvas>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n\n            <div class=\"image-statistics-section\">\n                <div class=\"card\">\n                    <div class=\"card-header\">\n                        <h6 class=\"mb-0\"><i class=\"fas fa-chart-bar me-2\"></i>Per-Image Statistics</h6>\n                    </div>\n                    <div class=\"card-body\">\n                        <div class=\"table-responsive\">\n                            <table class=\"table table-bordered table-striped\">\n                                <thead class=\"table-light\">\n                                    <tr>\n                                        <th>Class</th>\n                                        <th class=\"text-center\">GT</th>\n                                        <th class=\"text-center\">Pred</th>\n                                        <th class=\"text-center\">TP</th>\n                                        <th class=\"text-center\">FP</th>\n                                        <th class=\"text-center\">FN</th>\n                                    </tr>\n                                </thead>\n                                <tbody>\n                                    ${classStatsRows || '<tr><td colspan=\"6\" class=\"text-center text-muted\">No statistics available</td></tr>'}\n                                </tbody>\n                            </table>\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                </div>\n            </div>\n        `;\n\n        // Add event listeners for navigation buttons\n        const prevBtn = document.getElementById('prev-image-btn');\n        const nextBtn = document.getElementById('next-image-btn');\n        if (prevBtn) {\n            prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.navigateImage(-1));\n        }\n        if (nextBtn) {\n            nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.navigateImage(1));\n        }\n\n        // Store current image data for re-rendering\n        this.currentImageData = data;\n\n        // Render image with bounding boxes\n        this.renderImageWithBoundingBoxes(data);\n\n        // Add event listeners for toggle buttons\n        this.setupToggleButtons();\n\n        // Add event listeners for zoom controls\n        this.setupZoomControls();\n\n        // Add event listeners for pan/drag functionality\n        this.setupPanDrag();\n    }\n\n    renderImageWithBoundingBoxes(data) {\n        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n        if (!canvas || !ctx) return;\n\n        // Set canvas dimensions\n        const width = data.dimensions?.width || 800;\n        const height = data.dimensions?.height || 600;\n        canvas.width = width;\n        canvas.height = height;\n\n        // Clear canvas and apply zoom/pan transforms\n        ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n        // Apply zoom and pan transformations\n        ctx.translate(this.panX, this.panY);\n        ctx.scale(this.zoomLevel, this.zoomLevel);\n\n        // Create a placeholder image (since we don't have actual image files)\n        // In a real implementation, you would load the actual image file\n        this.drawPlaceholderImage(ctx, width, height);\n\n        // Draw bounding boxes\n        const gtBoxes = data.ground_truth_boxes || [];\n        const predBoxes = data.prediction_boxes || [];\n\n        // Combine all boxes for rendering\n        // FN boxes are GT boxes without matching prediction (classification is null)\n        const fnBoxes = gtBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === null);\n        // FP boxes are prediction boxes without matching GT\n        const fpBoxes = predBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === 'fp');\n        // TP boxes are matched predictions (classification is 'tp')\n        const tpBoxes = predBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === 'tp');\n\n        // Draw GT boxes (FN only, since TP are predictions that match GT)\n        if (this.showGTBoxes) {\n            fnBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'fn'));\n        }\n\n        // Draw prediction boxes (FP and TP)\n        if (this.showPredBoxes) {\n            fpBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'fp'));\n            tpBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'tp'));\n        }\n    }\n\n    drawPlaceholderImage(ctx, width, height) {\n        // Draw a gradient background\n        const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, width, height);\n        gradient.addColorStop(0, '#f0f9ff');\n        gradient.addColorStop(1, '#e0f2fe');\n        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;\n        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n\n        // Draw some placeholder shapes to simulate an image\n        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';\n        ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n\n        // Draw a grid\n        for (let x = 0; x < width; x += 50) {\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(x, 0);\n            ctx.lineTo(x, height);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        }\n        for (let y = 0; y < height; y += 50) {\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(0, y);\n            ctx.lineTo(width, y);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        }\n\n        // Draw placeholder text\n        ctx.fillStyle = '#94a3b8';\n        ctx.font = '24px Inter, sans-serif';\n        ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n        ctx.fillText('Image Placeholder', width / 2, height / 2);\n        ctx.font = '14px Inter, sans-serif';\n        ctx.fillText(`${width} x ${height}`, width / 2, height / 2 + 30);\n    }\n\n    drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, type) {\n        const bbox = box.bbox;\n        if (!bbox || bbox.length !== 4) return;\n\n        const [x1, y1, x2, y2] = bbox;\n        const width = x2 - x1;\n        const height = y2 - y1;\n\n        // Set style based on type\n        let color, lineWidth;\n        switch (type) {\n            case 'tp':\n                color = '#22c55e'; // green\n                lineWidth = 2;\n                break;\n            case 'fp':\n                color = '#ef4444'; // red\n                lineWidth = 2;\n                break;\n            case 'fn':\n                color = '#ef4444'; // red\n                lineWidth = 2;\n                break;\n            default:\n                return;\n        }\n\n        // Draw bounding box\n        ctx.strokeStyle = color;\n        ctx.lineWidth = lineWidth;\n\n        if (type === 'fn') {\n            ctx.setLineDash([5, 3]); // Dashed line for FN\n        } else {\n            ctx.setLineDash([]);\n        }\n\n        ctx.strokeRect(x1, y1, width, height);\n        ctx.setLineDash([]); // Reset dash\n\n        // Draw corner indicator (24x24px square at top-left)\n        const indicatorSize = 24;\n        const indicatorX = x1 - 2;\n        const indicatorY = y1 - 12;\n        const centerX = indicatorX + indicatorSize / 2;\n        const centerY = indicatorY + indicatorSize / 2;\n\n        ctx.fillStyle = color;\n        ctx.fillRect(indicatorX, indicatorY, indicatorSize, indicatorSize);\n\n        // Draw icon in the corner indicator using canvas paths instead of text\n        ctx.fillStyle = 'white';\n        ctx.strokeStyle = 'white';\n        ctx.lineWidth = 2;\n\n        if (type === 'tp') {\n            // Draw checkmark (✓)\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 4, centerY);\n            ctx.lineTo(centerX, centerY + 4);\n            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 6, centerY - 6);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        } else if (type === 'fp') {\n            // Draw cross (✗)\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 4, centerY - 4);\n            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 4, centerY + 4);\n            ctx.moveTo(centerX + 4, centerY - 4);\n            ctx.lineTo(centerX - 4, centerY + 4);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        } else if (type === 'fn') {\n            // Draw dash (—)\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 6, centerY);\n            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 6, centerY);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        }\n\n        // Draw label (class name and confidence for predictions)\n        if (this.showLabels) {\n            let labelText = '';\n            if (box.class_name) {\n                labelText = box.class_name;\n            }\n            if (box.confidence !== undefined && box.confidence !== null) {\n                labelText += ` (${box.confidence.toFixed(2)})`;\n            }\n\n            if (labelText) {\n                ctx.font = '11px Inter, sans-serif';\n                const textMetrics = ctx.measureText(labelText);\n                const labelWidth = textMetrics.width + 12;\n                const labelHeight = 20;\n\n                // Draw label background (semi-transparent)\n                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';\n                ctx.fillRect(x1, y1 + 12, labelWidth, labelHeight);\n\n                // Draw label text\n                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';\n                ctx.textAlign = 'left';\n                ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n                ctx.fillText(labelText, x1 + 6, y1 + 22);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    setupToggleButtons() {\n        // GT Boxes toggle\n        const gtToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-gt-boxes');\n        if (gtToggle) {\n            gtToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.showGTBoxes = !this.showGTBoxes;\n                gtToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Prediction Boxes toggle\n        const predToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-pred-boxes');\n        if (predToggle) {\n            predToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.showPredBoxes = !this.showPredBoxes;\n                predToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Labels toggle\n        const labelsToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-labels');\n        if (labelsToggle) {\n            labelsToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.showLabels = !this.showLabels;\n                labelsToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    reRenderCurrentImage() {\n        // Re-render the current image with updated visibility settings\n        if (this.currentImageData) {\n            this.renderImageWithBoundingBoxes(this.currentImageData);\n        }\n    }\n\n    setupZoomControls() {\n        // Zoom in button\n        const zoomInBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-in');\n        if (zoomInBtn) {\n            zoomInBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.zoomLevel = Math.min(this.zoomLevel + 0.25, 5.0); // Max zoom 5x\n                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Zoom out button\n        const zoomOutBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-out');\n        if (zoomOutBtn) {\n            zoomOutBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.zoomLevel = Math.max(this.zoomLevel - 0.25, 0.25); // Min zoom 0.25x\n                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Reset zoom button\n        const zoomResetBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-reset');\n        if (zoomResetBtn) {\n            zoomResetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.zoomLevel = 1.0;\n                this.panX = 0;\n                this.panY = 0;\n                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateZoomLevelDisplay() {\n        const zoomDisplay = document.getElementById('zoom-level-display');\n        if (zoomDisplay) {\n            zoomDisplay.textContent = `${Math.round(this.zoomLevel * 100)}%`;\n        }\n    }\n\n    setupPanDrag() {\n        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n        const container = document.getElementById('canvas-container');\n        if (!canvas || !container) return;\n\n        // Reset pan on new image load\n        this.panX = 0;\n        this.panY = 0;\n\n        // Update cursor style based on zoom level\n        this.updateCanvasCursor();\n\n        // Mouse down - start dragging\n        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {\n            if (this.zoomLevel === 1.0) return; // Only allow panning when zoomed\n\n            this.isDragging = true;\n            this.dragStartX = e.clientX;\n            this.dragStartY = e.clientY;\n        });\n\n        // Mouse move - update pan position\n        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n            if (!this.isDragging) return;\n\n            const dx = e.clientX - this.dragStartX;\n            const dy = e.clientY - this.dragStartY;\n\n            this.panX += dx;\n            this.panY += dy;\n\n            this.dragStartX = e.clientX;\n            this.dragStartY = e.clientY;\n\n            this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n        });\n\n        // Mouse up - stop dragging\n        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {\n            this.isDragging = false;\n        });\n\n        // Mouse leave - stop dragging\n        canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {\n            this.isDragging = false;\n        });\n    }\n\n    updateCanvasCursor() {\n        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n        if (!canvas) return;\n\n        if (this.zoomLevel === 1.0) {\n            canvas.classList.remove('zoomed');\n        } else {\n            canvas.classList.add('zoomed');\n        }\n    }\n\n    navigateImage(direction) {\n        const items = document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item');\n        if (items.length === 0) return;\n\n        let currentIndex = -1;\n        items.forEach((item, index) => {\n            if (item.classList.contains('active')) {\n                currentIndex = index;\n            }\n        });\n\n        if (currentIndex === -1) return;\n\n        let newIndex = currentIndex + direction;\n        if (newIndex < 0) newIndex = items.length - 1;\n        if (newIndex >= items.length) newIndex = 0;\n\n        const newImageId = parseInt(items[newIndex].getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n        this.selectImage(newImageId);\n    }\n\n    setupEventListeners() {\n        // Load dataset button (navbar)\n        const loadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('btn-load-dataset');\n        if (loadDatasetBtn) {\n            loadDatasetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.showLoadDatasetModal());\n        }\n\n        // Load dataset button (empty state)\n        const emptyLoadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('empty-load-dataset');\n        if (emptyLoadDatasetBtn) {\n            emptyLoadDatasetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.showLoadDatasetModal());\n        }\n\n        // Load dataset button (comparison view)\n        const comparisonLoadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('comparison-load-dataset');\n        if (comparisonLoadDatasetBtn) {\n            comparisonLoadDatasetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.showLoadDatasetModal());\n        }\n\n        // IoU threshold slider\n        const iouSlider = document.getElementById('iou-threshold');\n        if (iouSlider) {\n            iouSlider.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n                this.iouThreshold = parseFloat(e.target.value);\n                document.getElementById('iou-threshold-value').textContent = this.iouThreshold.toFixed(1);\n                this.updateSliderTrackFill(iouSlider);\n            });\n            iouSlider.addEventListener('change', () => {\n                this.recalculateStatistics();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Confidence threshold slider\n        const confidenceSlider = document.getElementById('confidence-threshold');\n        if (confidenceSlider) {\n            confidenceSlider.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n                this.confidenceThreshold = parseFloat(e.target.value);\n                document.getElementById('confidence-threshold-value').textContent = this.confidenceThreshold.toFixed(2);\n                this.updateSliderTrackFill(confidenceSlider);\n            });\n            confidenceSlider.addEventListener('change', () => {\n                this.recalculateStatistics();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Class search input (for metrics table)\n        const classSearch = document.getElementById('class-search');\n        if (classSearch) {\n            classSearch.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n                this.filterMetricsTable(e.target.value);\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Image list search input\n        const imageSearch = document.getElementById('image-search');\n        if (imageSearch) {\n            imageSearch.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n                this.filters.search = e.target.value;\n                // Apply client-side filtering for search\n                this.applyClientSideFilters();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Class filter dropdown\n        const classFilter = document.getElementById('class-filter');\n        if (classFilter) {\n            classFilter.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n                this.filters.classFilter = e.target.value;\n                // Reload images with new class filter\n                this.loadImagesList();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Status filter dropdown\n        const statusFilter = document.getElementById('status-filter');\n        if (statusFilter) {\n            statusFilter.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n                this.filters.statusFilter = e.target.value;\n                // Reload images with new status filter\n                this.loadImagesList();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Setup sortable table headers\n        this.setupSortableTableHeaders();\n\n        // Export buttons\n        const exportCsvBtn = document.getElementById('export-csv');\n        if (exportCsvBtn) {\n            exportCsvBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.exportStatistics('csv'));\n        }\n\n        const exportJsonBtn = document.getElementById('export-json');\n        if (exportJsonBtn) {\n            exportJsonBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.exportStatistics('json'));\n        }\n\n        // Save to window for global access\n        window.app = this;\n    }\n\n    setupSliderTrackFill() {\n        // Initialize track fill for all sliders\n        const sliders = document.querySelectorAll('.form-range');\n        sliders.forEach(slider => {\n            this.updateSliderTrackFill(slider);\n        });\n    }\n\n    setupSortableTableHeaders() {\n        // Store current sort state\n        this.currentSort = {\n            column: null,\n            direction: 'asc'\n        };\n\n        // Get all sortable headers\n        const sortableHeaders = document.querySelectorAll('th.sortable');\n        sortableHeaders.forEach(header => {\n            header.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                const sortColumn = header.getAttribute('data-sort');\n                const sortType = header.getAttribute('data-type');\n\n                // Toggle sort direction if clicking same column\n                if (this.currentSort.column === sortColumn) {\n                    this.currentSort.direction = this.currentSort.direction === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc';\n                } else {\n                    this.currentSort.column = sortColumn;\n                    this.currentSort.direction = 'asc';\n                }\n\n                // Update sort icons\n                this.updateSortIcons();\n\n                // Sort the table\n                this.sortMetricsTable(sortColumn, sortType, this.currentSort.direction);\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    updateSortIcons() {\n        // Clear all sort icons\n        const allIcons = document.querySelectorAll('.sort-icon');\n        allIcons.forEach(icon => {\n            icon.innerHTML = '';\n        });\n\n        // Set icon for current sort column\n        if (this.currentSort.column) {\n            const header = document.querySelector(`th[data-sort=\"${this.currentSort.column}\"]`);\n            if (header) {\n                const icon = header.querySelector('.sort-icon');\n                if (icon) {\n                    icon.innerHTML = this.currentSort.direction === 'asc' ? '&#9650;' : '&#9660;'; // Up or down arrow\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    sortMetricsTable(column, type, direction) {\n        const tableBody = document.getElementById('metrics-table-body');\n        if (!tableBody) return;\n\n        const rows = Array.from(tableBody.querySelectorAll('tr'));\n\n        // Get column index\n        const headerIndex = this.getColumnIndex(column);\n        if (headerIndex === -1) return;\n\n        // Sort rows\n        rows.sort((rowA, rowB) => {\n            const cellA = rowA.cells[headerIndex];\n            const cellB = rowB.cells[headerIndex];\n\n            if (!cellA || !cellB) return 0;\n\n            let valueA, valueB;\n\n            if (type === 'string') {\n                valueA = cellA.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();\n                valueB = cellB.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();\n            } else {\n                // For numeric values, remove formatting and parse\n                valueA = parseFloat(cellA.textContent.replace(/[^\\d.-]/g, '')) || 0;\n                valueB = parseFloat(cellB.textContent.replace(/[^\\d.-]/g, '')) || 0;\n            }\n\n            if (valueA < valueB) return direction === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;\n            if (valueA > valueB) return direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;\n            return 0;\n        });\n\n        // Reorder rows in the table\n        rows.forEach(row => {\n            tableBody.appendChild(row);\n        });\n    }\n\n    getColumnIndex(columnName) {\n        const headers = document.querySelectorAll('th[data-sort]');\n        for (let i = 0; i < headers.length; i++) {\n            if (headers[i].getAttribute('data-sort') === columnName) {\n                return i;\n            }\n        }\n        return -1;\n    }\n\n    updateSliderTrackFill(slider) {\n        // Calculate the percentage of the slider value\n        const min = parseFloat(slider.min) || 0;\n        const max = parseFloat(slider.max) || 1;\n        const value = parseFloat(slider.value) || 0;\n        const percentage = ((value - min) / (max - min)) * 100;\n\n        // Update the background gradient for track fill effect\n        const primaryColor = '#2c5282';\n        const trackColor = '#e2e8f0';\n        slider.style.background = `linear-gradient(to right, ${primaryColor} 0%, ${primaryColor} ${percentage}%, ${trackColor} ${percentage}%, ${trackColor} 100%)`;\n    }\n\n    showLoadDatasetModal() {\n        const modalElement = document.getElementById('loadDatasetModal');\n        const modal = new bootstrap.Modal(modalElement);\n        modal.show();\n\n        // Handle confirm button\n        const confirmBtn = document.getElementById('confirm-load-dataset');\n        if (confirmBtn) {\n            // Remove old event listener if exists\n            const newConfirmBtn = confirmBtn.cloneNode(true);\n            confirmBtn.parentNode.replaceChild(newConfirmBtn, confirmBtn);\n\n            newConfirmBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                const pathInput = document.getElementById('dataset-path');\n                const path = pathInput?.value?.trim();\n\n                if (!path) {\n                    this.showError('Please enter a dataset path');\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                // Hide modal and load dataset\n                modal.hide();\n                this.loadDataset(path);\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    async loadDataset(path) {\n        try {\n            this.showLoading();\n\n            // Small delay to ensure loading overlay is visible during testing\n            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));\n\n            const response = await fetch('/api/dataset/load', {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: {\n                    'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n                },\n                body: JSON.stringify({\n                    dataset_path: path,\n                    iou_threshold: this.iouThreshold\n                })\n            });\n\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n            if (data.success) {\n                this.datasetId = data.dataset_id;\n                window.location.hash = '#dashboard';\n                await this.loadStatistics();\n            } else {\n                this.showError('Failed to load dataset');\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            this.showError('Error loading dataset: ' + error.message);\n        } finally {\n            this.hideLoading();\n        }\n    }\n\n    async loadStatistics() {\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch(`/api/statistics/${this.datasetId}`);\n            const data = await response.json();\n            this.updateDashboard(data);\n            // Update dashboard display state\n            this.showDashboard();\n        } catch (error) {\n            this.showError('Error loading statistics');\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateDashboard(data) {\n        // Update summary cards\n        if (data.overall_metrics) {\n            document.getElementById('summary-total-images').textContent = data.overall_metrics.total_gt_boxes || '-';\n            document.getElementById('summary-total-classes').textContent = data.classes?.length || '-';\n            document.getElementById('summary-avg-recall').textContent = data.overall_metrics.recall !== undefined ? data.overall_metrics.recall.toFixed(3) : '-';\n            document.getElementById('summary-avg-precision').textContent = data.overall_metrics.precision !== undefined ? data.overall_metrics.precision.toFixed(3) : '-';\n        }\n\n        // Update metrics table\n        this.updateMetricsTable(data.classes || []);\n\n        // Update charts\n        this.updateCharts(data.classes || []);\n    }\n\n    updateMetricsTable(classes) {\n        const tableBody = document.getElementById('metrics-table-body');\n        if (!tableBody) return;\n\n        if (classes.length === 0) {\n            tableBody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan=\"10\" class=\"text-center text-muted\">No data available.</td></tr>';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        tableBody.innerHTML = classes.map(cls => `\n            <tr>\n                <td><strong>${this.escapeHtml(cls.name)}</strong></td>\n                <td>${cls.total_gt_count || 0}</td>\n                <td>${cls.total_pred_count || 0}</td>\n                <td>${cls.tp_count || 0}</td>\n                <td>${cls.fp_count || 0}</td>\n                <td>${cls.fn_count || 0}</td>\n                <td>${cls.recall !== undefined ? cls.recall.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n                <td>${cls.precision !== undefined ? cls.precision.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n                <td>${cls.fpr !== undefined ? cls.fpr.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n                <td>${cls.f1_score !== undefined ? cls.f1_score.toFixed(3) : '-'}</td>\n            </tr>\n        `).join('');\n    }\n\n    updateCharts(classes) {\n        if (classes.length === 0) return;\n\n        const labels = classes.map(cls => cls.name);\n        const recallData = classes.map(cls => cls.recall !== undefined ? cls.recall : 0);\n        const precisionData = classes.map(cls => cls.precision !== undefined ? cls.precision : 0);\n        const fprData = classes.map(cls => cls.fpr !== undefined ? cls.fpr : 0);\n\n        // Generate colors for each class\n        const colors = this.generateColors(classes.length);\n\n        // Update recall chart\n        this.createOrUpdateChart('recall-chart', 'Recall', labels, recallData, colors);\n\n        // Update precision chart\n        this.createOrUpdateChart('precision-chart', 'Precision', labels, precisionData, colors);\n\n        // Update FPR chart\n        this.createOrUpdateChart('fpr-chart', 'False Positive Rate', labels, fprData, colors);\n    }\n\n    createOrUpdateChart(canvasId, label, labels, data, colors) {\n        const canvas = document.getElementById(canvasId);\n        if (!canvas) return;\n\n        // Set canvas height explicitly for Chart.js to render properly\n        canvas.style.height = '300px';\n        canvas.style.width = '100%';\n\n        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n\n        // Check if chart already exists and destroy it\n        if (canvas.chart) {\n            canvas.chart.destroy();\n        }\n\n        // Create new chart with enhanced tooltip configuration\n        canvas.chart = new Chart(ctx, {\n            type: 'bar',\n            data: {\n                labels: labels,\n                datasets: [{\n                    label: label,\n                    data: data,\n                    backgroundColor: colors.map(c => c.background),\n                    borderColor: colors.map(c => c.border),\n                    borderWidth: 2\n                }]\n            },\n            options: {\n                responsive: true,\n                maintainAspectRatio: false,\n                scales: {\n                    y: {\n                        beginAtZero: true,\n                        max: 1,\n                        grid: {\n                            color: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)'\n                        }\n                    },\n                    x: {\n                        grid: {\n                            display: false\n                        }\n                    }\n                },\n                plugins: {\n                    legend: {\n                        display: false\n                    },\n                    tooltip: {\n                        enabled: true,\n                        backgroundColor: 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8)',\n                        titleColor: '#fff',\n                        bodyColor: '#fff',\n                        borderColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2)',\n                        borderWidth: 1,\n                        padding: 12,\n                        cornerRadius: 6,\n                        callbacks: {\n                            label: function(context) {\n                                return `${context.dataset.label}: ${context.parsed.y.toFixed(3)}`;\n                            },\n                            title: function(context) {\n                                return context[0].label;\n                            }\n                        }\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    generateColors(count) {\n        const colors = [];\n        const baseHues = [210, 150, 45, 0, 270, 180, 300, 330, 30, 60]; // Blue, green, orange, red, purple, cyan, magenta, pink, brown, yellow\n\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n            const hue = baseHues[i % baseHues.length];\n            const saturation = 70;\n            const lightness = 50;\n            colors.push({\n                background: `hsla(${hue}, ${saturation}%, ${lightness}%, 0.7)`,\n                border: `hsla(${hue}, ${saturation}%, ${lightness - 10}%, 1)`\n            });\n        }\n\n        return colors;\n    }\n\n    escapeHtml(text) {\n        const div = document.createElement('div');\n        div.textContent = text;\n        return div.innerHTML;\n    }\n\n    showLoading() {\n        const overlay = document.getElementById('loading-overlay') || overlay.className = 'loading-overlay';\n        overlay.innerHTML = '<div class=\"spinner\"></div>';\n        document.body.appendChild(overlay);\n        return overlay;\n    }\n\n    showError(message) {\n        alert(message); // TODO: Implement proper error modal\n    }\n\n    async recalculateStatistics() {\n        if (!this.datasetId) return;\n\n        try {\n            this.showLoading();\n\n            const response = await fetch('/api/statistics/recalculate', {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: {\n                    'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n                },\n                body: JSON.stringify({\n                    dataset_id: this.datasetId,\n                    iou_threshold: this.iouThreshold,\n                    confidence_threshold: this.confidenceThreshold\n                })\n            });\n\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n            if (data.success) {\n                await this.loadStatistics();\n            } else {\n                this.showError('Failed to recalculate statistics');\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            this.showError('Error recalculating statistics: ' + error.message);\n        } finally {\n            this.hideLoading();\n        }\n    }\n\n    filterMetricsTable(searchTerm) {\n        const tableBody = document.getElementById('metrics-table-body');\n        if (!tableBody) return;\n\n        const rows = tableBody.querySelectorAll('tr');\n        rows.forEach(row => {\n            const classNameCell = row.querySelector('td:first-child');\n            if (classNameCell) {\n                const className = classNameCell.textContent.toLowerCase();\n                if (className.includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) {\n                    row.style.display = '';\n                } else {\n                    row.style.display = 'none';\n                }\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    async exportStatistics(format) {\n        if (!this.datasetId) {\n            this.showError('No dataset loaded');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch(`/api/statistics/export/${this.datasetId}?format=${format}`);\n\n            if (response.ok) {\n                const blob = await response.blob();\n                const url = window.URL.createObjectURL(blob);\n                const a = document.createElement('a');\n                a.href = url;\n                a.download = `statistics_dataset_${this.datasetId}.${format}`;\n                document.body.appendChild(a);\n                a.click();\n                window.URL.revokeObjectURL(url);\n                document.body.removeChild(a);\n            } else {\n                const errorData = await response.json();\n                this.showError(errorData.error || 'Failed to export statistics');\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            this.showError('Error exporting statistics: ' + error.message);\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// Initialize application when DOM is ready\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {\n    new DetectionAnalyzer();\n});\n","numLines":1380,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1380}}}

Validate dataset\n    40→    validation_result = validate_dataset(dataset_path)\n    41→    if not validation_result['valid']:\n    42→        return {\n    43→            'success': False,\n    44→            'errors': validation_result['errors'],\n    45→            'dataset_path': dataset_path\n    46→        }\n    47→\n    48→    path = Path(dataset_path)\n    49→    images_dir = path / 'images'\n    50→    gt_dir = path / 'gt'\n    51→    predictions_dir = path / 'predictions'\n    52→\n    53→    # Supported image extensions\n    54→    image_extensions = {'.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.bmp', '.tiff', '.tif'}\n    55→\n    56→    # Collect all image files\n    57→    image_files = [\n    58→        f for f in images_dir.iterdir()\n    59→        if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() in image_extensions\n    60→    ]\n    61→\n    62→    if len(image_files) == 0:\n    63→        return {\n    64→            'success': False,\n    65→            'errors': ['No image files found in images/ directory'],\n    66→            'dataset_path': dataset_path\n    67→        }\n    68→\n    69→    # Create mapping from filename stem to image file\n    70→    image_map = {f.stem: f for f in image_files}\n    71→\n    72→    # Collect all GT and prediction files\n    73→    gt_files = {f.stem.replace('_gt', '').replace('_pred', ''): f for f in gt_dir.iterdir() if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() == '.json'}\n    74→    pred_files = {f.stem.replace('_gt', '').replace('_pred', ''): f for f in predictions_dir.iterdir() if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() == '.json'}\n    75→\n    76→    # Parse all data\n    77→    parsed_data = []\n    78→    errors = []\n    79→\n    80→    for image_stem, image_file in image_map.items():\n    81→        try:\n    82→            # Get corresponding GT and prediction files\n    83→            gt_file = gt_files.get(image_stem)\n    84→            pred_file = pred_files.get(image_stem)\n    85→\n    86→            if gt_file is None and pred_file is None:\n    87→                errors.append(f\"No annotation files found for {image_file.name}\")\n    88→                continue\n    89→\n    90→            data_entry = {\n    91→                'image_path': str(image_file),\n    92→                'image_filename': image_file.name,\n    93→                'image_stem': image_stem,\n    94→                'gt_data': None,\n    95→                'pred_data': None\n    96→            }\n    97→\n    98→            # Parse GT file if exists\n    99→            if gt_file is not None:\n   100→                try:\n   101→                    gt_data = parse_ground_truth_file(str(gt_file))\n   102→                    data_entry['gt_data'] = gt_data\n   103→                except Exception as e:\n   104→                    errors.append(f\"Error parsing GT file {gt_file.name}: {e}\")\n   105→\n   106→            # Parse prediction file if exists\n   107→            if pred_file is not None:\n   108→                try:\n   109→                    pred_data = parse_prediction_file(str(pred_file))\n   110→                    data_entry['pred_data'] = pred_data\n   111→                except Exception as e:\n   112→                    errors.append(f\"Error parsing prediction file {pred_file.name}: {e}\")\n   113→\n   114→            # Only include if we have at least one annotation file\n   115→            if data_entry['gt_data'] is not None or data_entry['pred_data'] is not None:\n   116→                parsed_data.append(data_entry)\n   117→\n   118→        except Exception as e:\n   119→            errors.append(f\"Error processing {image_file.name}: {e}\")\n   120→\n   121→    if len(parsed_data) == 0:\n   122→        return {\n   123→            'success': False,\n   124→            'errors': errors + ['No valid image-annotation pairs found'],\n   125→            'dataset_path': dataset_path\n   126→        }\n   127→\n   128→    # Generate thumbnails and collect all classes\n   129→    all_classes = set()\n   130→    thumbnail_dir = os.path.join('app', 'static', 'thumbnails')\n   131→    os.makedirs(thumbnail_dir, exist_ok=True)\n   132→\n   133→    for entry in parsed_data:\n   134→        # Generate thumbnail\n   135→        try:\n   136→            entry['thumbnail_path'] = generate_thumbnail(\n   137→                entry['image_path'],\n   138→                output_dir=thumbnail_dir,\n   139→                size=(150, 150),\n   140→                preserve_aspect_ratio=True\n   141→            )\n   142→        except Exception as e:\n   143→            errors.append(f\"Error generating thumbnail for {entry['image_filename']}: {e}\")\n   144→            entry['thumbnail_path'] = None\n   145→\n   146→        # Collect classes from GT\n   147→        if entry['gt_data']:\n   148→            classes = get_unique_classes_from_gt(entry['gt_data'])\n   149→            all_classes.update(classes)\n   150→\n   151→        # Collect classes from predictions\n   152→        if entry['pred_data']:\n   153→            classes = get_unique_classes_from_pred(entry['pred_data'])\n   154→            all_classes.update(classes)\n   155→\n   156→    all_classes = sorted(list(all_classes))\n   157→\n   158→    # Store data in database\n   159→    dataset_id = store_dataset_in_database(\n   160→        dataset_path=dataset_path,\n   161→        parsed_data=parsed_data,\n   162→        all_classes=all_classes,\n   163→        iou_threshold=iou_threshold,\n   164→        confidence_threshold=confidence_threshold,\n   165→        errors=errors\n   166→    )\n   167→\n   168→    return {\n   169→        'success': True,\n   170→        'dataset_id': dataset_id,\n   171→        'total_images': len(parsed_data),\n   172→        'total_classes': len(all_classes),\n   173→        'errors': errors,\n   174→        'dataset_path': dataset_path\n   175→    }\n   176→\n   177→\n   178→def store_dataset_in_database(\n   179→    dataset_path: str,\n   180→    parsed_data: List[Dict[str, Any]],\n   181→    all_classes: List[str],\n   182→    iou_threshold: float,\n   183→    confidence_threshold: float,\n   184→    errors: List[str]\n   185→) -> int:\n   186→    \"\"\"\n   187→    Store parsed dataset data in database\n   188→\n   189→    Args:\n   190→        dataset_path: Path to dataset directory\n   191→        parsed_data: List of parsed image data entries\n   192→        all_classes: List of unique class names\n   193→        iou_threshold: IoU threshold used\n   194→        confidence_threshold: Confidence threshold used\n   195→        errors: List of errors encountered\n   196→\n   197→    Returns:\n   198→        int: The dataset_id of the inserted dataset\n   199→    \"\"\"\n   200→    with get_db() as conn:\n   201→        cursor = conn.cursor()\n   202→\n   203→        # Clear old dataset with same path if exists\n   204→        cursor.execute('DELETE FROM dataset_metadata WHERE path = ?', (dataset_path,))\n   205→\n   206→        # Insert dataset metadata\n   207→        cursor.execute('''\n   208→            INSERT INTO dataset_metadata\n   209→            (path, total_images, total_classes, iou_threshold, confidence_threshold)\n   210→            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n   211→        ''', (dataset_path, len(parsed_data), len(all_classes), iou_threshold, confidence_threshold))\n   212→\n   213→        dataset_id = cursor.lastrowid\n   214→\n   215→        # Insert classes\n   216→        class_id_map = {}\n   217→        for class_name in all_classes:\n   218→            cursor.execute('''\n   219→                INSERT INTO classes (dataset_id, name, total_gt_count, total_pred_count, tp_count, fp_count, fn_count)\n   220→                VALUES (?, ?, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0)\n   221→            ''', (dataset_id, class_name))\n   222→            class_id_map[class_name] = cursor.lastrowid\n   223→\n   224→        # Process each image\n   225→        for entry in parsed_data:\n   226→            gt_data = entry.get('gt_data')\n   227→            pred_data = entry.get('pred_data')\n   228→\n   229→            # Get image dimensions (prefer GT data, fallback to prediction data or open image)\n   230→            width = 0\n   231→            height = 0\n   232→            if gt_data:\n   233→                width = gt_data.get('width', 0)\n   234→                height = gt_data.get('height', 0)\n   235→            elif pred_data:\n   236→                width = pred_data.get('width', 0)\n   237→                height = pred_data.get('height', 0)\n   238→\n   239→            # If dimensions not found, try to get from image file\n   240→            if width == 0 or height == 0:\n   241→                try:\n   242→                    from PIL import Image\n   243→                    with Image.open(entry['image_path']) as img:\n   244→                        width, height = img.size\n   245→                except:\n   246→                    pass\n   247→\n   248→            # Count GT and prediction boxes\n   249→            total_gt_boxes = len(gt_data.get('annotations', [])) if gt_data else 0\n   250→            total_pred_boxes = len(pred_data.get('predictions', [])) if pred_data else 0\n   251→\n   252→            # Insert image metadata\n   253→            cursor.execute('''\n   254→                INSERT INTO image_metadata\n   255→                (dataset_id, filename, width, height, thumbnail_path, total_gt_boxes, total_pred_boxes, has_fp, has_fn, is_perfect)\n   256→                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 0, 0, 1)\n   257→            ''', (dataset_id, entry['image_filename'], width, height, entry['thumbnail_path'], total_gt_boxes, total_pred_boxes))\n   258→\n   259→            image_id = cursor.lastrowid\n   260→\n   261→            # Collect boxes by class\n   262→            gt_boxes_by_class = defaultdict(list)\n   263→            pred_boxes_by_class = defaultdict(list)\n   264→\n   265→            # Process GT boxes\n   266→            if gt_data:\n   267→                for idx, ann in enumerate(gt_data.get('annotations', [])):\n   268→                    class_name = ann['class']\n   269→                    bbox = ann['bbox']\n   270→                    class_id = class_id_map[class_name]\n   271→\n   272→                    gt_boxes_by_class[class_name].append(bbox)\n   273→\n   274→                    # Insert GT bounding box\n   275→                    cursor.execute('''\n   276→                        INSERT INTO bounding_boxes\n   277→                        (image_id, class_id, type, x1, y1, x2, y2, confidence, iou, classification)\n   278→                        VALUES (?, ?, 'ground_truth', ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, NULL, NULL)\n   279→                    ''', (image_id, class_id, bbox[0], bbox[1], bbox[2], bbox[3]))\n   280→\n   281→            # Process prediction boxes (filter by confidence threshold)\n   282→            if pred_data:\n   283→                for pred in pred_data.get('predictions', []):\n   284→                    if pred['score'] < confidence_threshold:\n   285→                        continue  # Skip low confidence predictions\n   286→\n   287→                    class_name = pred['class']\n   288→                    bbox = pred['bbox']\n   289→                    class_id = class_id_map[class_name]\n   290→\n   291→                    pred_boxes_by_class[class_name].append(bbox)\n   292→\n   293→                    # Insert prediction bounding box\n   294→                    cursor.execute('''\n   295→                        INSERT INTO bounding_boxes\n   296→                        (image_id, class_id, type, x1, y1, x2, y2, confidence, iou, classification)\n   297→                        VALUES (?, ?, 'prediction', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, NULL)\n   298→                    ''', (image_id, class_id, bbox[0], bbox[1], bbox[2], bbox[3], pred['score']))\n   299→\n   300→            # Calculate metrics for each class in this image\n   301→            image_has_fp = False\n   302→            image_has_fn = False\n   303→\n   304→            for class_name in all_classes:\n   305→                class_id = class_id_map[class_name]\n   306→                gt_boxes = gt_boxes_by_class[class_name]\n   307→                pred_boxes = pred_boxes_by_class[class_name]\n   308→\n   309→                # Classify boxes\n   310→                classification = classify_bounding_boxes(gt_boxes, pred_boxes, iou_threshold)\n   311→\n   312→                # Update bounding boxes with classification\n   313→                # First, get the IDs of boxes we just inserted\n   314→                if classification['tp']:\n   315→                    for gt_idx, pred_idx in classification['tp']:\n   316→                        # Get the last inserted boxes and update them\n   317→                        # For simplicity, we'll just calculate metrics here\n   318→\n   319→                        # Update GT box as TP\n   320→                        cursor.execute('''\n   321→                            UPDATE bounding_boxes SET classification = 'tp'\n   322→                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'ground_truth'\n   323→                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ?\n   324→                            ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET ?\n   325→                        ''', (image_id, class_id, gt_boxes[gt_idx][0], gt_boxes[gt_idx][1], gt_idx))\n   326→\n   327→                        # Get the prediction box IoU\n   328→                        iou = calculate_iou(gt_boxes[gt_idx], pred_boxes[pred_idx])\n   329→\n   330→                        # Update prediction box as TP with IoU\n   331→                        cursor.execute('''\n   332→                            UPDATE bounding_boxes SET classification = 'tp', iou = ?\n   333→                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'prediction'\n   334→                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ?\n   335→                            ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET ?\n   336→                        ''', (iou, image_id, class_id, pred_boxes[pred_idx][0], pred_boxes[pred_idx][1], pred_idx))\n   337→\n   338→                if classification['fp']:\n   339→                    for pred_idx in classification['fp']:\n   340→                        image_has_fp = True\n   341→                        cursor.execute('''\n   342→                            UPDATE bounding_boxes SET classification = 'fp'\n   343→                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'prediction'\n   344→                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ?\n   345→                            ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET ?\n   346→                        ''', (image_id, class_id, pred_boxes[pred_idx][0], pred_boxes[pred_idx][1], pred_idx))\n   347→\n   348→                if classification['fn']:\n   349→                    for gt_idx in classification['fn']:\n   350→                        image_has_fn = True\n   351→                        cursor.execute('''\n   352→                            UPDATE bounding_boxes SET classification = 'fn'\n   353→                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'ground_truth'\n   354→                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ?\n   355→                            ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET ?\n   356→                        ''', (image_id, class_id, gt_boxes[gt_idx][0], gt_boxes[gt_idx][1], gt_idx))\n   357→\n   358→            # Update image metadata with FP/FN flags\n   359→            is_perfect = not (image_has_fp or image_has_fn)\n   360→            cursor.execute('''\n   361→                UPDATE image_metadata\n   362→                SET has_fp = ?, has_fn = ?, is_perfect = ?\n   363→                WHERE id = ?\n   364→            ''', (int(image_has_fp), int(image_has_fn), int(is_perfect), image_id))\n   365→\n   366→        # Calculate overall metrics for each class\n   367→        for class_name, class_id in class_id_map.items():\n   368→            # Get all boxes for this class\n   369→            cursor.execute('''\n   370→                SELECT type, classification\n   371→                FROM bounding_boxes\n   372→                WHERE class_id = ?\n   373→            ''', (class_id,))\n   374→\n   375→            tp_count = 0\n   376→            fp_count = 0\n   377→            fn_count = 0\n   378→            total_gt_count = 0\n   379→            total_pred_count = 0\n   380→\n   381→            for row in cursor.fetchall():\n   382→                box_type = row[0]\n   383→                classification = row[1]\n   384→\n   385→                if box_type == 'ground_truth':\n   386→                    total_gt_count += 1\n   387→                    if classification == 'fn':\n   388→                        fn_count += 1\n   389→                elif box_type == 'prediction':\n   390→                    total_pred_count += 1\n   391→                    if classification == 'fp':\n   392→                        fp_count += 1\n   393→                    elif classification == 'tp':\n   394→                        tp_count += 1\n   395→\n   396→            # Calculate metrics\n   397→            metrics = calculate_class_metrics(tp_count, fp_count, fn_count)\n   398→\n   399→            # Update class metrics\n   400→            cursor.execute('''\n   401→                UPDATE classes\n   402→                SET total_gt_count = ?, total_pred_count = ?,\n   403→                    tp_count = ?, fp_count = ?, fn_count = ?,\n   404→                    recall = ?, precision = ?, fpr = ?, f1_score = ?\n   405→                WHERE id = ?\n   406→            ''', (\n   407→                total_gt_count, total_pred_count,\n   408→                tp_count, fp_count, fn_count,\n   409→                metrics['recall'], metrics['precision'], metrics['fpr'], metrics['f1_score'],\n   410→                class_id\n   411→            ))\n   412→\n   413→        conn.commit()\n   414→\n   415→    return dataset_id\n   416→\n   417→\n   418→def recalculate_statistics(dataset_id: int, iou_threshold: float, confidence_threshold: float) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n   419→    \"\"\"\n   420→    Recalculate statistics for a dataset with new thresholds\n   421→\n   422→    Args:\n   423→        dataset_id: ID of the dataset to recalculate\n   424→        iou_threshold: New IoU threshold for TP/FP classification\n   425→        confidence_threshold: New confidence threshold for predictions\n   426→\n   427→    Returns:\n   428→        Dictionary containing:\n   429→            - success (bool): Whether recalculation was successful\n   430→            - classes (list): Array of class statistics with updated metrics\n   431→            - overall_metrics (dict): Overall metrics across all classes\n   432→            - iou_threshold (float): Updated IoU threshold\n   433→            - confidence_threshold (float): Updated confidence threshold\n   434→            - errors (list): List of any errors encountered\n   435→    \"\"\"\n   436→    errors = []\n   437→\n   438→    try:\n   439→        with get_db() as conn:\n   440→            cursor = conn.cursor()\n   441→\n   442→            # Check if dataset exists\n   443→            cursor.execute('''\n   444→                SELECT id, path\n   445→                FROM dataset_metadata\n   446→                WHERE id = ?\n   447→            ''', (dataset_id,))\n   448→\n   449→            dataset_row = cursor.fetchone()\n   450→\n   451→            if dataset_row is None:\n   452→                return {\n   453→                    'success': False,\n   454→                    'errors': [f'Dataset with ID {dataset_id} not found'],\n   455→                    'iou_threshold': iou_threshold,\n   456→                    'confidence_threshold': confidence_threshold\n   457→                }\n   458→\n   459→            dataset_path = dataset_row[1]\n   460→\n   461→            # Get all images for this dataset\n   462→            cursor.execute('''\n   463→                SELECT id, filename\n   464→                FROM image_metadata\n   465→                WHERE dataset_id = ?\n   466→                ORDER BY id\n   467→            ''', (dataset_id,))\n   468→\n   469→            image_rows = cursor.fetchall()\n   470→\n   471→            # Get all classes for this dataset\n   472→            cursor.execute('''\n   473→                SELECT id, name\n   474→                FROM classes\n   475→                WHERE dataset_id = ?\n   476→                ORDER BY name\n   477→            ''', (dataset_id,))\n   478→\n   479→            class_rows = cursor.fetchall()\n   480→            class_id_map = {row[1]: {'id': row[0], 'name': row[1]} for row in class_rows}\n   481→\n   482→            # Process each image\n   483→            for image_id, filename in image_rows:\n   484→                # Get all bounding boxes for this image\n   485→                cursor.execute('''\n   486→                    SELECT bb.id, bb.class_id, bb.type, bb.x1, bb.y1, bb.x2, bb.y2, bb.confidence, c.name\n   487→                    FROM bounding_boxes bb\n   488→                    JOIN classes c ON bb.class_id = c.id\n   489→                    WHERE bb.image_id = ?\n   490→                    ORDER BY bb.id\n   491→                ''', (image_id,))\n   492→\n   493→                bbox_rows = cursor.fetchall()\n   494→\n   495→                # Separate GT and prediction boxes by class\n   496→                gt_boxes_by_class = defaultdict(list)\n   497→                pred_boxes_by_class = defaultdict(list)\n   498→                bbox_ids_by_class = defaultdict(list)  # Store bbox IDs for updating\n   499→\n   500→                for bbox_id, class_id, bbox_type, x1, y1, x2, y2, confidence, class_name in bbox_rows:\n   501→\n   502→                    if bbox_type == 'ground_truth':\n   503→                        gt_boxes_by_class[class_name].append((x1, y1, x2, y2))\n   504→                        bbox_ids_by_class[class_name].append({'id': bbox_id, 'type': 'gt', 'coords': (x1, y1, x2, y2)})\n   505→                    elif bbox_type == 'prediction':\n   506→                        # Filter by confidence threshold\n   507→                        if confidence is None or confidence >= confidence_threshold:\n   508→                            pred_boxes_by_class[class_name].append((x1, y1, x2, y2))\n   509→                            bbox_ids_by_class[class_name].append({'id': bbox_id, 'type': 'pred', 'coords': (x1, y1, x2, y2), 'confidence': confidence})\n   510→\n   511→                # Reset classification for all boxes\n   512→                for bbox_info in [item for sublist in bbox_ids_by_class.values() for item in             WHERE id = ?\n   517→                    ''', (bbox_info['id'],))\n   518→\n   519→                # Recalculate classifications for each class\n   520→                image_has_fp = with new classifications and IoU values\n   532→                    # True Positives\n   533→                    for gt_idx, pred_idx in classification['tp']:\n   534→                        # Find        # Update GT box as TP\n   539→                        cursor.execute('''\n   540→                            UPDATE bounding_boxes\n   541→                            SET classification = 'tp'\n   542→                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'ground_truth'\n   543→                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ? AND x2 = ? AND y2 = ?\n   544→                        ''', (image_id, class_id, gt_coords[0], gt_coords[1], gt_coords[2], gt_coords[3]))\n   545→\n   546→                        # Calculate and update prediction box with IoU\n   547→                        iou = calculate_iou(gt_coords, pred_coords)\n   548→                        cursor.execute('''\n   549→                            UPDATE bounding_boxes\n   550→                            SET classification = 'tp', iou = ?\n   551→                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'ground_truth'\n   574→                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ? AND x2 = ? AND y2 = ?\n   575→                        ''', (image_id, class_id, gt_coords[0], gt_coords[1], gt_coords[2], gt_coords[3]))\n   576→\n   577→            # Update dataset metadata with new 585→            classes_data = []\n   586→            overall_tp = 0\n   587→            overall_fp = 0\n   588→            overall_fn = 0\n   589→            total_gt = 0\n   590→ this class\n   596→                cursor.execute('''\n   597→                    SELECT type, classification\n   598→                    FROM bounding_boxes\n   599→                    WHERE class_id = ?\n   600→                ''', (class_id,))\n   601→\n   602→                tp_count = 0\n   603→                fp_count = 0\n   604→                fn_count = 0\n   605→                total_gt_count = 0\n   606→                total_pred_count = 0\n   607→\n   608→                for row in cursor.fetchall():\n   609→                    box_type = row[0]\n   610→                    classification = row[1]\n   611→\n   612→                    if box_type == 'ground_truth':\n   613→                        total_gt_count += 1\n   614→                        if classification == 'fn':\n   615→                            fn_count += 1\n   616→                    elif box_type == 'prediction':\n   617→                        total_pred_count += 1\n   618→                        if classification == 'fp':\n   619→                            fp_count += 1\n   620→                        elif classification == 'tp':\n   621→                            tp_count += 1\n   622→\n 627→                cursor.execute('''\n   628→                    UPDATE classes\n   629→                    SET total_gt_count = ?, total_pred_count = ?,\n   630→                        tp_count = ?, fp_count = ?, fn_count = ?,\n   631→                        recall = ?, precision = ?, fpr = ?, f1_score = ?\n   632→                    WHERE id = ?\n   633→                ''', (\n   634→                    total_gt_count, total_pred_count,\n   635→                    tp_count, fp_count, fn_count,\n   636→                    metrics['recall'], metrics['precision'], metrics['fpr'], metrics['f1_score'],\n   637→                    class_id\n   638→                ))\n   639→\n   640→                # Add to classes_data\n   641→                classes_data.append({\n   642→ 'recall': metrics['recall'],\n   650→                    'precision': metrics['precision'],\n   651→                    'fpr': metrics['fpr'],\n   652→                    'f1_score': metrics['f1_score']\n   653→                })\n   654→\n   655→                # Accumulate for overall metrics\n   656→                overall_tp += tp_count\n   657→                overall_fp += fp_count\n   658→                overall_fn += fn_count\n   659→                total_gt += total_gt_count\n   660→                total_pred += total_pred_count\n   661→\n   662→            # Calculate overall metrics\n   663→            if (overall_tp + overall_fn) > 0:\n   664→                overall_recall = overall_tp / (overall_tp + overall_fn)\n   665→            else:\n   666→                overall_recall = 0.0\n   667→\n   668→            if (overall_tp + overall_fp) > 0:\n   669→                overall_precision = overall_tp / (overall_tp + overall_fp)\n   670→            else:\n   671→                overall_precision = 0.0\n   672→\n   673→            if (overall_precision + overall_recall) > 0:\n   674→                overall_f1 = 2 * (overall_precision * overall_recall) / (overall_precision + overall_recall)\n   675→            else:\n   676→                overall_f1 = 0.0\n   677→\n   678→            if (overall_fp + overall_tp) > 0:\n   679→                overall_fpr = overall_fp / (overall_fp + overall_tp)\n   680→            else:\n   681→                overall_fpr = 0.0\n   682→\n   683→            overall_metrics = {\n   684→                'total_gt_boxes': total_gt,\n   685→                'total_pred_boxes': total_pred,\n   686→                'total_tp': overall_tp,\n   687→                'total_fp': overall_fp,\n   688→                'total_fn': overall_fn,\n   689→                'recall': overall_recall,\n   690→                'precision': overall_precision,\n   691→                'fpr': overall_fpr,\n   692→                'f1_score': overall_f1\n   693→            }\n   694→\n   695→            conn.commit()\n   696→\n   697→            return {\n   698→                'success': True,\n   699→
