Validate dataset\n    validation_result = validate_dataset(dataset_path)\n    if not validation_result['valid']:\n        return {\n            'success': False,\n            'errors': validation_result['errors'],\n            'dataset_path': dataset_path\n        }\n\n    path = Path(dataset_path)\n    images_dir = path / 'images'\n    gt_dir = path / 'gt'\n    predictions_dir = path / 'predictions'\n\n    # Supported image extensions\n    image_extensions = {'.jpg', '.jpeg', '.png', '.bmp', '.tiff', '.tif'}\n\n    # Collect all image files\n    image_files = [\n        f for f in images_dir.iterdir()\n        if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() in image_extensions\n    ]\n\n    if len(image_files) == 0:\n        return {\n            'success': False,\n            'errors': ['No image files found in images/ directory'],\n            'dataset_path': dataset_path\n        }\n\n    # Create mapping from filename stem to image file\n    image_map = {f.stem: f for f in image_files}\n\n    # Collect all GT and prediction files\n    gt_files = {f.stem.replace('_gt', '').replace('_pred', ''): f for f in gt_dir.iterdir() if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() == '.json'}\n    pred_files = {f.stem.replace('_gt', '').replace('_pred', ''): f for f in predictions_dir.iterdir() if f.is_file() and f.suffix.lower() == '.json'}\n\n    # Parse all data\n    parsed_data = []\n    errors = []\n\n    for image_stem, image_file in image_map.items():\n        try:\n            # Get corresponding GT and prediction files\n            gt_file = gt_files.get(image_stem)\n            pred_file = pred_files.get(image_stem)\n\n            if gt_file is None and pred_file is None:\n                errors.append(f\"No annotation files found for {image_file.name}\")\n                continue\n\n            data_entry = {\n                'image_path': str(image_file),\n                'image_filename': image_file.name,\n                'image_stem': image_stem,\n                'gt_data': None,\n                'pred_data': None\n            }\n\n            # Parse GT file if exists\n            if gt_file is not None:\n                try:\n                    gt_data = parse_ground_truth_file(str(gt_file))\n                    data_entry['gt_data'] = gt_data\n                except Exception as e:\n                    errors.append(f\"Error parsing GT file {gt_file.name}: {e}\")\n\n            # Parse prediction file if exists\n            if pred_file is not None:\n                try:\n                    pred_data = parse_prediction_file(str(pred_file))\n                    data_entry['pred_data'] = pred_data\n                except Exception as e:\n                    errors.append(f\"Error parsing prediction file {pred_file.name}: {e}\")\n\n            # Only include if we have at least one annotation file\n            if data_entry['gt_data'] is not None or data_entry['pred_data'] is not None:\n                parsed_data.append(data_entry)\n\n        except Exception as e:\n            errors.append(f\"Error processing {image_file.name}: {e}\")\n\n    if len(parsed_data) == 0:\n        return {\n            'success': False,\n            'errors': errors + ['No valid image-annotation pairs found'],\n            'dataset_path': dataset_path\n        }\n\n    # Generate thumbnails and collect all classes\n    all_classes = set()\n    thumbnail_dir = os.path.join('app', 'static', 'thumbnails')\n    os.makedirs(thumbnail_dir, exist_ok=True)\n\n    for entry in parsed_data:\n        # Generate thumbnail\n        try:\n            entry['thumbnail_path'] = generate_thumbnail(\n                entry['image_path'],\n                output_dir=thumbnail_dir,\n                size=(150, 150),\n                preserve_aspect_ratio=True\n            )\n        except Exception as e:\n            errors.append(f\"Error generating thumbnail for {entry['image_filename']}: {e}\")\n            entry['thumbnail_path'] = None\n\n        # Collect classes from GT\n        if entry['gt_data']:\n            classes = get_unique_classes_from_gt(entry['gt_data'])\n            all_classes.update(classes)\n\n        # Collect classes from predictions\n        if entry['pred_data']:\n            classes = get_unique_classes_from_pred(entry['pred_data'])\n            all_classes.update(classes)\n\n    all_classes = sorted(list(all_classes))\n\n    # Store data in database\n    dataset_id = store_dataset_in_database(\n        dataset_path=dataset_path,\n        parsed_data=parsed_data,\n        all_classes=all_classes,\n        iou_threshold=iou_threshold,\n        confidence_threshold=confidence_threshold,\n        errors=errors\n    )\n\n    return {\n        'success': True,\n        'dataset_id': dataset_id,\n        'total_images': len(parsed_data),\n        'total_classes': len(all_classes),\n        'errors': errors,\n        'dataset_path': dataset_path\n    }\n\n\ndef store_dataset_in_database(\n    dataset_path: str,\n    parsed_data: List[Dict[str, Any]],\n    all_classes: List[str],\n    iou_threshold: float,\n    confidence_threshold: float,\n    errors: List[str]\n) -> int:\n    \"\"\"\n    Store parsed dataset data in database\n\n    Args:\n        dataset_path: Path to dataset directory\n        parsed_data: List of parsed image data entries\n        all_classes: List of unique class names\n        iou_threshold: IoU threshold used\n        confidence_threshold: Confidence threshold used\n        errors: List of errors encountered\n\n    Returns:\n        int: The dataset_id of the inserted dataset\n    \"\"\"\n    with get_db() as conn:\n        cursor = conn.cursor()\n\n        # Clear old dataset with same path if exists\n        cursor.execute('DELETE FROM dataset_metadata WHERE path = ?', (dataset_path,))\n\n        # Insert dataset metadata\n        cursor.execute('''\n            INSERT INTO dataset_metadata\n            (path, total_images, total_classes, iou_threshold, confidence_threshold)\n            VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\n        ''', (dataset_path, len(parsed_data), len(all_classes), iou_threshold, confidence_threshold))\n\n        dataset_id = cursor.lastrowid\n\n        # Insert classes\n        class_id_map = {}\n        for class_name in all_classes:\n            cursor.execute('''\n                INSERT INTO classes (dataset_id, name, total_gt_count, total_pred_count, tp_count, fp_count, fn_count)\n                VALUES (?, ?, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0)\n            ''', (dataset_id, class_name))\n            class_id_map[class_name] = cursor.lastrowid\n\n        # Process each image\n        for entry in parsed_data:\n            gt_data = entry.get('gt_data')\n            pred_data = entry.get('pred_data')\n\n            # Get image dimensions (prefer GT data, fallback to prediction data or open image)\n            width = 0\n            height = 0\n            if gt_data:\n                width = gt_data.get('width', 0)\n                height = gt_data.get('height', 0)\n            elif pred_data:\n                width = pred_data.get('width', 0)\n                height = pred_data.get('height', 0)\n\n            # If dimensions not found, try to get from image file\n            if width == 0 or height == 0:\n                try:\n                    from PIL import Image\n                    with Image.open(entry['image_path']) as img:\n                        width, height = img.size\n                except:\n                    pass\n\n            # Count GT and prediction boxes\n            total_gt_boxes = len(gt_data.get('annotations', [])) if gt_data else 0\n            total_pred_boxes = len(pred_data.get('predictions', [])) if pred_data else 0\n\n            # Insert image metadata\n            cursor.execute('''\n                INSERT INTO image_metadata\n                (dataset_id, filename, width, height, thumbnail_path, total_gt_boxes, total_pred_boxes, has_fp, has_fn, is_perfect)\n                VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, 0, 0, 1)\n            ''', (dataset_id, entry['image_filename'], width, height, entry['thumbnail_path'], total_gt_boxes, total_pred_boxes))\n\n            image_id = cursor.lastrowid\n\n            # Collect boxes by class\n            gt_boxes_by_class = defaultdict(list)\n            pred_boxes_by_class = defaultdict(list)\n\n            # Process GT boxes\n            if gt_data:\n                for idx, ann in enumerate(gt_data.get('annotations', [])):\n                    class_name = ann['class']\n                    bbox = ann['bbox']\n                    class_id = class_id_map[class_name]\n\n                    gt_boxes_by_class[class_name].append(bbox)\n\n                    # Insert GT bounding box\n                    cursor.execute('''\n                        INSERT INTO bounding_boxes\n                        (image_id, class_id, type, x1, y1, x2, y2, confidence, iou, classification)\n                        VALUES (?, ?, 'ground_truth', ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, NULL, NULL)\n                    ''', (image_id, class_id, bbox[0], bbox[1], bbox[2], bbox[3]))\n\n            # Process prediction boxes (filter by confidence threshold)\n            if pred_data:\n                for pred in pred_data.get('predictions', []):\n                    if pred['score'] < confidence_threshold:\n                        continue  # Skip low confidence predictions\n\n                    class_name = pred['class']\n                    bbox = pred['bbox']\n                    class_id = class_id_map[class_name]\n\n                    pred_boxes_by_class[class_name].append(bbox)\n\n                    # Insert prediction bounding box\n                    cursor.execute('''\n                        INSERT INTO bounding_boxes\n                        (image_id, class_id, type, x1, y1, x2, y2, confidence, iou, classification)\n                        VALUES (?, ?, 'prediction', ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, NULL)\n                    ''', (image_id, class_id, bbox[0], bbox[1], bbox[2], bbox[3], pred['score']))\n\n            # Calculate metrics for each class in this image\n            image_has_fp = False\n            image_has_fn = False\n\n            for class_name in all_classes:\n                class_id = class_id_map[class_name]\n                gt_boxes = gt_boxes_by_class[class_name]\n                pred_boxes = pred_boxes_by_class[class_name]\n\n                # Classify boxes\n                classification = classify_bounding_boxes(gt_boxes, pred_boxes, iou_threshold)\n\n                # Update bounding boxes with classification\n                # First, get the IDs of boxes we just inserted\n                if classification['tp']:\n                    for gt_idx, pred_idx in classification['tp']:\n                        # Get the last inserted boxes and update them\n                        # For simplicity, we'll just calculate metrics here\n\n                        # Update GT box as TP\n                        cursor.execute('''\n                            UPDATE bounding_boxes SET classification = 'tp'\n                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'ground_truth'\n                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ?\n                            ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET ?\n                        ''', (image_id, class_id, gt_boxes[gt_idx][0], gt_boxes[gt_idx][1], gt_idx))\n\n                        # Get the prediction box IoU\n                        iou = calculate_iou(gt_boxes[gt_idx], pred_boxes[pred_idx])\n\n                        # Update prediction box as TP with IoU\n                        cursor.execute('''\n                            UPDATE bounding_boxes SET classification = 'tp', iou = ?\n                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'prediction'\n                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ?\n                            ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET ?\n                        ''', (iou, image_id, class_id, pred_boxes[pred_idx][0], pred_boxes[pred_idx][1], pred_idx))\n\n                if classification['fp']:\n                    for pred_idx in classification['fp']:\n                        image_has_fp = True\n                        cursor.execute('''\n                            UPDATE bounding_boxes SET classification = 'fp'\n                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'prediction'\n                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ?\n                            ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET ?\n                        ''', (image_id, class_id, pred_boxes[pred_idx][0], pred_boxes[pred_idx][1], pred_idx))\n\n                if classification['fn']:\n                    for gt_idx in classification['fn']:\n                        image_has_fn = True\n                        cursor.execute('''\n                            UPDATE bounding_boxes SET classification = 'fn'\n                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'ground_truth'\n                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ?\n                            ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET ?\n                        ''', (image_id, class_id, gt_boxes[gt_idx][0], gt_boxes[gt_idx][1], gt_idx))\n\n            # Update image metadata with FP/FN flags\n            is_perfect = not (image_has_fp or image_has_fn)\n            cursor.execute('''\n                UPDATE image_metadata\n                SET has_fp = ?, has_fn = ?, is_perfect = ?\n                WHERE id = ?\n            ''', (int(image_has_fp), int(image_has_fn), int(is_perfect), image_id))\n\n        # Calculate overall metrics for each class\n        for class_name, class_id in class_id_map.items():\n            # Get all boxes for this class\n            cursor.execute('''\n                SELECT type, classification\n                FROM bounding_boxes\n                WHERE class_id = ?\n            ''', (class_id,))\n\n            tp_count = 0\n            fp_count = 0\n            fn_count = 0\n            total_gt_count = 0\n            total_pred_count = 0\n\n            for row in cursor.fetchall():\n                box_type = row[0]\n                classification = row[1]\n\n                if box_type == 'ground_truth':\n                    total_gt_count += 1\n                    if classification == 'fn':\n                        fn_count += 1\n                elif box_type == 'prediction':\n                    total_pred_count += 1\n                    if classification == 'fp':\n                        fp_count += 1\n                    elif classification == 'tp':\n                        tp_count += 1\n\n            # Calculate metrics\n            metrics = calculate_class_metrics(tp_count, fp_count, fn_count)\n\n            # Update class metrics\n            cursor.execute('''\n                UPDATE classes\n                SET total_gt_count = ?, total_pred_count = ?,\n                    tp_count = ?, fp_count = ?, fn_count = ?,\n                    recall = ?, precision = ?, fpr = ?, f1_score = ?\n                WHERE id = ?\n            ''', (\n                total_gt_count, total_pred_count,\n                tp_count, fp_count, fn_count,\n                metrics['recall'], metrics['precision'], metrics['fpr'], metrics['f1_score'],\n                class_id\n            ))\n\n        conn.commit()\n\n    return dataset_id\n\n\ndef recalculate_statistics(dataset_id: int, iou_threshold: float, confidence_threshold: float) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n    \"\"\"\n    Recalculate statistics for a dataset with new thresholds\n\n    Args:\n        dataset_id: ID of the dataset to recalculate\n        iou_threshold: New IoU threshold for TP/FP classification\n        confidence_threshold: New confidence threshold for predictions\n\n    Returns:\n        Dictionary containing:\n            - success (bool): Whether recalculation was successful\n            - classes (list): Array of class statistics with updated metrics\n            - overall_metrics (dict): Overall metrics across all classes\n            - iou_threshold (float): Updated IoU threshold\n            - confidence_threshold (float): Updated confidence threshold\n            - errors (list): List of any errors encountered\n    \"\"\"\n    errors = []\n\n    try:\n        with get_db() as conn:\n            cursor = conn.cursor()\n\n            # Check if dataset exists\n            cursor.execute('''\n                SELECT id, path\n                FROM dataset_metadata\n                WHERE id = ?\n            ''', (dataset_id,))\n\n            dataset_row = cursor.fetchone()\n\n            if dataset_row is None:\n                return {\n                    'success': False,\n                    'errors': [f'Dataset with ID {dataset_id} not found'],\n                    'iou_threshold': iou_threshold,\n                    'confidence_threshold': confidence_threshold\n                }\n\n            dataset_path = dataset_row[1]\n\n            # Get all images for this dataset\n            cursor.execute('''\n                SELECT id, filename\n                FROM image_metadata\n                WHERE dataset_id = ?\n                ORDER BY id\n            ''', (dataset_id,))\n\n            image_rows = cursor.fetchall()\n\n            # Get all classes for this dataset\n            cursor.execute('''\n                SELECT id, name\n                FROM classes\n                WHERE dataset_id = ?\n                ORDER BY name\n            ''', (dataset_id,))\n\n            class_rows = cursor.fetchall()\n            class_id_map = {row[1]: {'id': row[0], 'name': row[1]} for row in class_rows}\n\n            # Process each image\n            for image_id, filename in image_rows:\n                # Get all bounding boxes for this image\n                cursor.execute('''\n                    SELECT bb.id, bb.class_id, bb.type, bb.x1, bb.y1, bb.x2, bb.y2, bb.confidence, c.name\n                    FROM bounding_boxes bb\n                    JOIN classes c ON bb.class_id = c.id\n                    WHERE bb.image_id = ?\n                    ORDER BY bb.id\n                ''', (image_id,))\n\n                bbox_rows = cursor.fetchall()\n\n                # Separate GT and prediction boxes by class\n                gt_boxes_by_class = defaultdict(list)\n                pred_boxes_by_class = defaultdict(list)\n                bbox_ids_by_class = defaultdict(list)  # Store bbox IDs for updating\n\n                for bbox_id, class_id, bbox_type, x1, y1, x2, y2, confidence, class_name in bbox_rows:\n\n                    if bbox_type == 'ground_truth':\n                        gt_boxes_by_class[class_name].append((x1, y1, x2, y2))\n                        bbox_ids_by_class[class_name].append({'id': bbox_id, 'type': 'gt', 'coords': (x1, y1, x2, y2)})\n                    elif bbox_type == 'prediction':\n                        # Filter by confidence threshold\n                        if confidence is None or confidence >= confidence_threshold:\n                            pred_boxes_by_class[class_name].append((x1, y1, x2, y2))\n                            bbox_ids_by_class[class_name].append({'id': bbox_id, 'type': 'pred', 'coords': (x1, y1, x2, y2), 'confidence': confidence})\n\n                # Reset classification for all boxes\n                for bbox_info in [item for sublist in bbox_ids_by_class.values() for item in sublist]:\n                    cursor.execute('''\n                        UPDATE bounding_boxes\n                        SET classification = NULL, iou = NULL\n                        WHERE id = ?\n                    ''', (bbox_info['id'],))\n\n                # Recalculate classifications for each class\n                image_has_fp = False\n                image_has_fn = False\n\n                for class_name, class_info in class_id_map.items():\n                    gt_boxes = gt_boxes_by_class[class_name]\n                    pred_boxes = pred_boxes_by_class[class_name]\n                    class_id = class_info['id']\n\n                    # Classify boxes with new threshold\n                    classification = classify_bounding_boxes(gt_boxes, pred_boxes, iou_threshold)\n\n                    # Update bounding boxes with new classifications and IoU values\n                    # True Positives\n                    for gt_idx, pred_idx in classification['tp']:\n                        # Find corresponding bbox IDs and update them\n                        gt_coords = gt_boxes[gt_idx]\n                        pred_coords = pred_boxes[pred_idx]\n\n                        # Update GT box as TP\n                        cursor.execute('''\n                            UPDATE bounding_boxes\n                            SET classification = 'tp'\n                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'ground_truth'\n                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ? AND x2 = ? AND y2 = ?\n                        ''', (image_id, class_id, gt_coords[0], gt_coords[1], gt_coords[2], gt_coords[3]))\n\n                        # Calculate and update prediction box with IoU\n                        iou = calculate_iou(gt_coords, pred_coords)\n                        cursor.execute('''\n                            UPDATE bounding_boxes\n                            SET classification = 'tp', iou = ?\n                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'prediction'\n                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ? AND x2 = ? AND y2 = ?\n                        ''', (iou, image_id, class_id, pred_coords[0], pred_coords[1], pred_coords[2], pred_coords[3]))\n\n                    # False Positives\n                    for pred_idx in classification['fp']:\n                        image_has_fp = True\n                        pred_coords = pred_boxes[pred_idx]\n                        cursor.execute('''\n                            UPDATE bounding_boxes\n                            SET classification = 'fp'\n                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'prediction'\n                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ? AND x2 = ? AND y2 = ?\n                        ''', (image_id, class_id, pred_coords[0], pred_coords[1], pred_coords[2], pred_coords[3]))\n\n                    # False Negatives\n                    for gt_idx in classification['fn']:\n                        image_has_fn = True\n                        gt_coords = gt_boxes[gt_idx]\n                        cursor.execute('''\n                            UPDATE bounding_boxes\n                            SET classification = 'fn'\n                            WHERE image_id = ? AND class_id = ? AND type = 'ground_truth'\n                            AND x1 = ? AND y1 = ? AND x2 = ? AND y2 = ?\n                        ''', (image_id, class_id, gt_coords[0], gt_coords[1], gt_coords[2], gt_coords[3]))\n\n            # Update dataset metadata with new thresholds\n            cursor.execute('''\n                UPDATE dataset_metadata\n                SET iou_threshold = ?, confidence_threshold = ?, last_updated = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP\n                WHERE id = ?\n            ''', (iou_threshold, confidence_threshold, dataset_id))\n\n            # Recalculate metrics for each class\n            classes_data = []\n            overall_tp = 0\n            overall_fp = 0\n            overall_fn = 0\n            total_gt = 0\n            total_pred = 0\n\n            for class_name, class_info in class_id_map.items():\n                class_id = class_info['id']\n\n                # Get all boxes for this class\n                cursor.execute('''\n                    SELECT type, classification\n                    FROM bounding_boxes\n                    WHERE class_id = ?\n                ''', (class_id,))\n\n                tp_count = 0\n                fp_count = 0\n                fn_count = 0\n                total_gt_count = 0\n                total_pred_count = 0\n\n                for row in cursor.fetchall():\n                    box_type = row[0]\n                    classification = row[1]\n\n                    if box_type == 'ground_truth':\n                        total_gt_count += 1\n                        if classification == 'fn':\n                            fn_count += 1\n                    elif box_type == 'prediction':\n                        total_pred_count += 1\n                        if classification == 'fp':\n                            fp_count += 1\n                        elif classification == 'tp':\n                            tp_count += 1\n\n                # Calculate metrics\n                metrics = calculate_class_metrics(tp_count, fp_count, fn_count)\n\n                # Update class metrics in database\n                cursor.execute('''\n                    UPDATE classes\n                    SET total_gt_count = ?, total_pred_count = ?,\n                        tp_count = ?, fp_count = ?, fn_count = ?,\n                        recall = ?, precision = ?, fpr = ?, f1_score = ?\n                    WHERE id = ?\n                ''', (\n                    total_gt_count, total_pred_count,\n                    tp_count, fp_count, fn_count,\n                    metrics['recall'], metrics['precision'], metrics['fpr'], metrics['f1_score'],\n                    class_id\n                ))\n\n                # Add to classes_data\n                classes_data.append({\n                    'id': class_id,\n                    'name': class_name,\n                    'total_gt_count': total_gt_count,\n                    'total_pred_count': total_pred_count,\n                    'tp_count': tp_count,\n                    'fp_count': fp_count,\n                    'fn_count': fn_count,\n                    'recall': metrics['recall'],\n                    'precision': metrics['precision'],\n                    'fpr': metrics['fpr'],\n                    'f1_score': metrics['f1_score']\n                })\n\n                # Accumulate for overall metrics\n                overall_tp += tp_count\n                overall_fp += fp_count\n                overall_fn += fn_count\n                total_gt += total_gt_count\n                total_pred += total_pred_count\n\n            # Calculate overall metrics\n            if (overall_tp + overall_fn) > 0:\n                overall_recall = overall_tp / (overall_tp + overall_fn)\n            else:\n                overall_recall = 0.0\n\n            if (overall_tp + overall_fp) > 0:\n                overall_precision = overall_tp / (overall_tp + overall_fp)\n            else:\n                overall_precision = 0.0\n\n            if (overall_precision + overall_recall) > 0:\n                overall_f1 = 2 * (overall_precision * overall_recall) / (overall_precision + overall_recall)\n            else:\n                overall_f1 = 0.0\n\n            if (overall_fp + overall_tp) > 0:\n                overall_fpr = overall_fp / (overall_fp + overall_tp)\n            else:\n                overall_fpr = 0.0\n\n            overall_metrics = {\n                'total_gt_boxes': total_gt,\n                'total_pred_boxes': total_pred,\n                'total_tp': overall_tp,\n                'total_fp': overall_fp,\n                'total_fn': overall_fn,\n                'recall': overall_recall,\n                'precision': overall_precision,\n                'fpr': overall_fpr,\n                'f1_score': overall_f1\n            }\n\n            conn.commit()\n\n            return {\n                'success': True,\n                'classes': classes_data,\n                'overall_metrics': overall_metrics,\n                'iou_threshold': iou_threshold,\n                'confidence_threshold': confidence_threshold,\n                'errors': errors\n            }\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        return {\n            'success': False,\n            'errors': [str(e)],\n            'iou_threshold': iou_threshold,\n            'confidence_threshold': confidence_threshold\n        }\n\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    # Test dataset loading\n    import sys\n\n    print(\"=\" * 60)\n    print(\"Dataset Loader Test\")\n    print(\"=\" * 60)\n\n    test_dataset_path = './test_dataset' if len(sys.argv) < 2 else sys.argv[1]\n    test_iou_threshold = 0.5 if len(sys.argv) < 3 else float(sys.argv[2])\n\n    print(f\"\\nDataset Path: {test_dataset_path}\")\n    print(f\"IoU Threshold: {test_iou_threshold}\\n\")\n\n    result = load_dataset(test_dataset_path, test_iou_threshold)\n\n    print(\"=\" * 60)\n    print(\"Loading Result\")\n    print(\"=\" * 60)\n\n    if result['success']:\n        print(f\"\\n✓ Dataset loaded successfully\")\n        print(f\"  Dataset ID: {result['dataset_id']}\")\n        print(f\"  Total Images: {result['total_images']}\")\n        print(f\"  Total Classes: {result['total_classes']}\")\n\n        if result['errors']:\n            print(f\"\\nWarnings/Errors:\")\n            for error in result['errors'][:10]:  # Show first 10\n                print(f\"  - {error}\")\n            if len(result['errors']) > 10:\n                print(f\"  ... and {len(result['errors']) - 10} more\")\n    else:\n        print(f\"\\n✗ Dataset loading failed\")\n        print(f\"\\nErrors:\")\n        for error in result['errors']:\n            print(f\"  - {error}\")\n\n    print(\"=\" * 60)\n","numLines":754,"startLine":1,"totalLines":754}}}

this.setupPanDrag();\n    }\n\n    renderImageWithBoundingBoxes(data) {\n        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\n        if (!canvas || !ctx) return;\n\n        // Set canvas dimensions\n        const width = data.dimensions?.width || 800;\n        const height = data.dimensions?.height || 600;\n        canvas.width = width;\n        canvas.height = height;\n\n        // Clear canvas and apply zoom/pan transforms\n        ctx.setTransform(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0);\n        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);\n\n        // Apply zoom and pan transformations\n        ctx.translate(this.panX, this.panY);\n        ctx.scale(this.zoomLevel, this.zoomLevel);\n\n        // Create a placeholder image (since we don't have actual image files)\n        // In a real implementation, you would load the actual image file\n        this.drawPlaceholderImage(ctx, width, height);\n\n        // Draw bounding boxes\n        const gtBoxes = data.ground_truth_boxes || [];\n        const predBoxes = data.prediction_boxes || [];\n\n        // Combine all boxes for rendering\n        // FN boxes are GT boxes without matching prediction (classification is null)\n        const fnBoxes = gtBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === null);\n        // FP boxes are prediction boxes without matching GT\n        const fpBoxes = predBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === 'fp');\n        // TP boxes are matched predictions (classification is 'tp')\n        const tpBoxes = predBoxes.filter(box => box.classification === 'tp');\n\n        // Draw GT boxes (FN only, since TP are predictions that match GT)\n        if (this.showGTBoxes) {\n            fnBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'fn'));\n        }\n\n        // Draw prediction boxes (FP and TP)\n        if (this.showPredBoxes) {\n            fpBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'fp'));\n            tpBoxes.forEach(box => this.drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, 'tp'));\n        }\n    }\n\n    drawPlaceholderImage(ctx, width, height) {\n        // Draw a gradient background\n        const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, width, height);\n        gradient.addColorStop(0, '#f0f9ff');\n        gradient.addColorStop(1, '#e0f2fe');\n        ctx.fillStyle = gradient;\n        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);\n\n        // Draw some placeholder shapes to simulate an image\n        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';\n        ctx.lineWidth = 1;\n\n        // Draw a grid\n        for (let x = 0; x < width; x += 50) {\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(x, 0);\n            ctx.lineTo(x, height);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        }\n        for (let y = 0; y < height; y += 50) {\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(0, y);\n            ctx.lineTo(width, y);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        }\n\n        // Draw placeholder text\n        ctx.fillStyle = '#94a3b8';\n        ctx.font = '24px Inter, sans-serif';\n        ctx.textAlign = 'center';\n        ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n        ctx.fillText('Image Placeholder', width / 2, height / 2);\n        ctx.font = '14px Inter, sans-serif';\n        ctx.fillText(`${width} x ${height}`, width / 2, height / 2 + 30);\n    }\n\n    drawBoundingBox(ctx, box, type) {\n        const bbox = box.bbox;\n        if (!bbox || bbox.length !== 4) return;\n\n        const [x1, y1, x2, y2] = bbox;\n        const width = x2 - x1;\n        const height = y2 - y1;\n\n        // Set style based on type\n        let color, lineWidth;\n        switch (type) {\n            case 'tp':\n                color = '#22c55e'; // green\n                lineWidth = 2;\n                break;\n            case 'fp':\n                color = '#ef4444'; // red\n                lineWidth = 2;\n                break;\n            case 'fn':\n                color = '#ef4444'; // red\n                lineWidth = 2;\n                break;\n            default:\n                return;\n        }\n\n        // Draw bounding box\n        ctx.strokeStyle = color;\n        ctx.lineWidth = lineWidth;\n\n        if (type === 'fn') {\n            ctx.setLineDash([5, 3]); // Dashed line for FN\n        } else {\n            ctx.setLineDash([]);\n        }\n\n        ctx.strokeRect(x1, y1, width, height);\n        ctx.setLineDash([]); // Reset dash\n\n        // Draw corner indicator (24x24px square at top-left)\n        const indicatorSize = 24;\n        const indicatorX = x1 - 2;\n        const indicatorY = y1 - 12;\n        const centerX = indicatorX + indicatorSize / 2;\n        const centerY = indicatorY + indicatorSize / 2;\n\n        ctx.fillStyle = color;\n        ctx.fillRect(indicatorX, indicatorY, indicatorSize, indicatorSize);\n\n        // Draw icon in the corner indicator using canvas paths instead of text\n        ctx.fillStyle = 'white';\n        ctx.strokeStyle = 'white';\n        ctx.lineWidth = 2;\n\n        if (type === 'tp') {\n            // Draw checkmark (✓)\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 4, centerY);\n            ctx.lineTo(centerX, centerY + 4);\n            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 6, centerY - 6);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        } else if (type === 'fp') {\n            // Draw cross (✗)\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 4, centerY - 4);\n            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 4, centerY + 4);\n            ctx.moveTo(centerX + 4, centerY - 4);\n            ctx.lineTo(centerX - 4, centerY + 4);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        } else if (type === 'fn') {\n            // Draw dash (—)\n            ctx.beginPath();\n            ctx.moveTo(centerX - 6, centerY);\n            ctx.lineTo(centerX + 6, centerY);\n            ctx.stroke();\n        }\n\n        // Draw label (class name and confidence for predictions)\n        if (this.showLabels) {\n            let labelText = '';\n            if (box.class_name) {\n                labelText = box.class_name;\n            }\n            if (box.confidence !== undefined && box.confidence !== null) {\n                labelText += ` (${box.confidence.toFixed(2)})`;\n            }\n\n            if (labelText) {\n                ctx.font = '11px Inter, sans-serif';\n                const textMetrics = ctx.measureText(labelText);\n                const labelWidth = textMetrics.width + 12;\n                const labelHeight = 20;\n\n                // Draw label background (semi-transparent)\n                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';\n                ctx.fillRect(x1, y1 + 12, labelWidth, labelHeight);\n\n                // Draw label text\n                ctx.fillStyle = 'white';\n                ctx.textAlign = 'left';\n                ctx.textBaseline = 'middle';\n                ctx.fillText(labelText, x1 + 6, y1 + 22);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    setupToggleButtons() {\n        // GT Boxes toggle\n        const gtToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-gt-boxes');\n        if (gtToggle) {\n            gtToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.showGTBoxes = !this.showGTBoxes;\n                gtToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Prediction Boxes toggle\n        const predToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-pred-boxes');\n        if (predToggle) {\n            predToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.showPredBoxes = !this.showPredBoxes;\n                predToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Labels toggle\n        const labelsToggle = document.getElementById('toggle-labels');\n        if (labelsToggle) {\n            labelsToggle.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.showLabels = !this.showLabels;\n                labelsToggle.classList.toggle('active');\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    reRenderCurrentImage() {\n        // Re-render the current image with updated visibility settings\n        if (this.currentImageData) {\n            this.renderImageWithBoundingBoxes(this.currentImageData);\n        }\n    }\n\n    setupZoomControls() {\n        // Zoom in button\n        const zoomInBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-in');\n        if (zoomInBtn) {\n            zoomInBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.zoomLevel = Math.min(this.zoomLevel + 0.25, 5.0); // Max zoom 5x\n                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Zoom out button\n        const zoomOutBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-out');\n        if (zoomOutBtn) {\n            zoomOutBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.zoomLevel = Math.max(this.zoomLevel - 0.25, 0.25); // Min zoom 0.25x\n                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Reset zoom button\n        const zoomResetBtn = document.getElementById('zoom-reset');\n        if (zoomResetBtn) {\n            zoomResetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                this.zoomLevel = 1.0;\n                this.panX = 0;\n                this.panY = 0;\n                this.updateZoomLevelDisplay();\n                this.updateCanvasCursor();\n                this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateZoomLevelDisplay() {\n        const zoomDisplay = document.getElementById('zoom-level-display');\n        if (zoomDisplay) {\n            zoomDisplay.textContent = `${Math.round(this.zoomLevel * 100)}%`;\n        }\n    }\n\n    setupPanDrag() {\n        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n        const container = document.getElementById('canvas-container');\n        if (!canvas || !container) return;\n\n        // Reset pan on new image load\n        this.panX = 0;\n        this.panY = 0;\n\n        // Update cursor style based on zoom level\n        this.updateCanvasCursor();\n\n        // Mouse down - start dragging\n        canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {\n            if (this.zoomLevel === 1.0) return; // Only allow panning when zoomed\n\n            this.isDragging = true;\n            this.dragStartX = e.clientX;\n            this.dragStartY = e.clientY;\n        });\n\n        // Mouse move - update pan position\n        canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {\n            if (!this.isDragging) return;\n\n            const dx = e.clientX - this.dragStartX;\n            const dy = e.clientY - this.dragStartY;\n\n            this.panX += dx;\n            this.panY += dy;\n\n            this.dragStartX = e.clientX;\n            this.dragStartY = e.clientY;\n\n            this.reRenderCurrentImage();\n        });\n\n        // Mouse up - stop dragging\n        canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => {\n            this.isDragging = false;\n        });\n\n        // Mouse leave - stop dragging\n        canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {\n            this.isDragging = false;\n        });\n    }\n\n    updateCanvasCursor() {\n        const canvas = document.getElementById('image-canvas');\n        if (!canvas) return;\n\n        if (this.zoomLevel === 1.0) {\n            canvas.classList.remove('zoomed');\n        } else {\n            canvas.classList.add('zoomed');\n        }\n    }\n\n    navigateImage(direction) {\n        const items = document.querySelectorAll('.image-list-item');\n        if (items.length === 0) return;\n\n        let currentIndex = -1;\n        items.forEach((item, index) => {\n            if (item.classList.contains('active')) {\n                currentIndex = index;\n            }\n        });\n\n        if (currentIndex === -1) return;\n\n        let newIndex = currentIndex + direction;\n        if (newIndex < 0) newIndex = items.length - 1;\n        if (newIndex >= items.length) newIndex = 0;\n\n        const newImageId = parseInt(items[newIndex].getAttribute('data-image-id'));\n        this.selectImage(newImageId);\n    }\n\n    setupEventListeners() {\n        // Load dataset button (navbar)\n        const loadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('btn-load-dataset');\n        if (loadDatasetBtn) {\n            loadDatasetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.showLoadDatasetModal());\n        }\n\n        // Load dataset button (empty state)\n        const emptyLoadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('empty-load-dataset');\n        if (emptyLoadDatasetBtn) {\n            emptyLoadDatasetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.showLoadDatasetModal());\n        }\n\n        // Load dataset button (comparison view)\n        const comparisonLoadDatasetBtn = document.getElementById('comparison-load-dataset');\n        if (comparisonLoadDatasetBtn) {\n            comparisonLoadDatasetBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.showLoadDatasetModal());\n        }\n\n        // IoU threshold slider\n        const iouSlider = document.getElementById('iou-threshold');\n        if (iouSlider) {\n            iouSlider.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n                this.iouThreshold = parseFloat(e.target.value);\n                document.getElementById('iou-threshold-value').textContent = this.iouThreshold.toFixed(1);\n                this.updateSliderTrackFill(iouSlider);\n            });\n            iouSlider.addEventListener('change', () => {\n                this.recalculateStatistics();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Confidence threshold slider\n        const confidenceSlider = document.getElementById('confidence-threshold');\n        if (confidenceSlider) {\n            confidenceSlider.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n                this.confidenceThreshold = parseFloat(e.target.value);\n                document.getElementById('confidence-threshold-value').textContent = this.confidenceThreshold.toFixed(2);\n                this.updateSliderTrackFill(confidenceSlider);\n            });\n            confidenceSlider.addEventListener('change', () => {\n                this.recalculateStatistics();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Class search input (for metrics table)\n        const this.filterMetricsTable(e.target.value);\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Image list search input\n        const imageSearch = document.getElementById('image-search');\n        if (imageSearch) {\n            imageSearch.addEventListener('input', (e) => {\n                this.filters.search = e.target.value;\n                // Apply client-side filtering for search\n                this.applyClientSideFilters();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Class filter dropdown\n        const classFilter = document.getElementById('class-filter');\n        if (classFilter) {\n            classFilter.addEventListener('change', (e) => {\n                this.filters.classFilter = e.target.value;\n                // Reload images with new class filter\n                this.loadImagesList();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Status filter dropdown\n        const statusFilter = document.getElementById('status-filter');\n        if (statusFilter) {\n this.loadImagesList();\n            });\n        }\n\n        // Setup sortable table headers\n        this.setupSortableTableHeaders();\n\n        // Export buttons\n        const exportCsvBtn = document.getElementById('export-csv');\n        if (exportCsvBtn) {\n            exportCsvBtn.addEventListener('click', () => this.exportStatistics('csv'));\n        }\n\n        const exportJsonBtn = for global access\n        window.app = this;\n    }\n\n    setupSliderTrackFill() {\n        // Initialize track fill for all sliders\n        const sliders = document.querySelectorAll('.form-range');\n        sliders.forEach(slider => {\n            this.updateSliderTrackFill(slider);\n        });\n    }\n\n    setupSortableTableHeaders() {\n        // Store current sort state\n        this.currentSort = {\n            column: null,\n            direction: 'asc'\n        };\n\n        // Get all sortable headers\n        const sortableHeaders = document.querySelectorAll('th.sortable');\n        sortableHeaders.forEach(header => {\n            header.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                const sortColumn = header.getAttribute('data-sort');\n                const sortType = header.getAttribute('data-type');\n\n                // Toggle sort direction if clicking same column\n                if (this.currentSort.column === sortColumn) {\n                    this.currentSort.direction = this.currentSort.direction === 'asc' ? 'desc' : 'asc';\n                } else {\n                    this.currentSort.column = sortColumn;\n                    this.currentSort.direction = 'asc';\n                }\n\n                // Update sort icons\n                this.updateSortIcons();\n\n                // Sort the table\n                this.sortMetricsTable(sortColumn, sortType, this.currentSort.direction);\n            });\n        });\n    }\n\n    updateSortIcons() {\n        // Clear all sort icons\n        const allIcons = document.querySelectorAll('.sort-icon');\n        allIcons.forEach(icon => {\n            icon.innerHTML = '';\n        });\n\n        // Set icon for current sort column\n        if (this.currentSort.column) {\n            const header = document.querySelector(`th[data-sort=\"${this.currentSort.column}\"]`);\n            if (header) {\n                const icon = header.querySelector('.sort-icon');\n                if (icon) {\n                    icon.innerHTML = this.currentSort.direction === 'asc' ? '&#9650;' : '&#9660;'; // Up or down arrow\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    sortMetricsTable(column, type, direction) {\n        const tableBody = document.getElementById('metrics-table-body');\n        if (!tableBody) return;\n\n        const rows = Array.from(tableBody.querySelectorAll('tr'));\n\n        // Get column index\n        const headerIndex = this.getColumnIndex(column);\n        if (headerIndex === -1) return;\n\n        // Sort rows\n        rows.sort((rowA, rowB) => {\n            const cellA = rowA.cells[headerIndex];\n            const cellB = rowB.cells[headerIndex];\n\n            if (!cellA || !cellB) return 0;\n\n            let valueA, valueB;\n\n            if (type === 'string') {\n                valueA = cellA.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();\n                valueB = cellB.textContent.trim().toLowerCase();\n            } else {\n                // For numeric values, remove formatting and parse\n                valueA = parseFloat(cellA.textContent.replace(/[^\\d.-]/g, '')) || 0;\n                valueB = parseFloat(cellB.textContent.replace(/[^\\d.-]/g, '')) || 0;\n            }\n\n            if (valueA < valueB) return direction === 'asc' ? -1 : 1;\n            if (valueA > valueB) return direction === 'asc' ? 1 : -1;\n            return 0;\n        });\n\n        // Reorder rows in the table\n        rows.forEach(row => {\n            tableBody.appendChild(row);\n        });\n    }\n\n    getColumnIndex(columnName) {\n        const headers = document.querySelectorAll('th[data-sort]');\n        for (let i = 0; i < headers.length; i++) {\n            if (headers[i].getAttribute('data-sort') === columnName) {\n                return i;\n            }\n        }\n        return -1;\n    }\n\n    updateSliderTrackFill(slider) {\n        // Calculate the percentage of the slider value\n        const min = parseFloat(slider.min) || 0;\n        const max = parseFloat(slider.max) || 1;\n        const value = parseFloat(slider.value) || 0;\n        const percentage = ((value - min) / (max - min)) * 100;\n\n        // Update the background gradient for track fill effect\n        const primaryColor = '#2c5282';\n        const trackColor = '#e2e8f0';\n        slider.style.background = `linear-gradient(to right, ${primaryColor} 0%, ${primaryColor} ${percentage}%, ${trackColor} ${percentage}%, ${trackColor} 100%)`;\n    }\n\n    showLoadDatasetModal() {\n        const modalElement = document.getElementById('loadDatasetModal');\n if (confirmBtn) {\n            // Remove old event listener if exists\n            const newConfirmBtn = confirmBtn.cloneNode(true);\n            confirmBtn.parentNode.replaceChild(newConfirmBtn, confirmBtn);\n\n            newConfirmBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {\n                const pathInput = document.getElementById('dataset-path');\n                const path = pathInput?.value?.trim();\n\n                if (!path) {\n                    this.showError('Please enter a dataset path');\n                    return;\n                }\n\n                // Hide modal and load dataset\n                modal.hide();\n                this.loadDataset(path);\n            });\n        }\n    }\n\n    async loadDataset(path) {\n        try {\n            this.showLoading();\n\n            // Small delay to ensure loading overlay is visible during testing\n            await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 1000));\n\n            const response = await fetch('/api/dataset/load', {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: {\n                    'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n                },\n                body: JSON.stringify({\n                    dataset_path: path,\n                    iou_threshold: this.iouThreshold\n                })\n            });\n\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n            if (data.success) {\n                this.datasetId = data.dataset_id;\n                window.location.hash = '#dashboard';\n                await this.loadStatistics();\n            } else {\n                this.showError('Failed to load dataset');\n            }\n        } catch (error) {\n            this.showError('Error loading dataset: ' + error.message);\n        } finally {\n            this.hideLoading();\n        }\n    }\n\n    async loadStatistics() {\n        try {\n            const response = await this.showDashboard();\n        } catch (error) {\n            this.showError('Error loading statistics');\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateDashboard(data) {\n        // Update summary cards\n        if data.overall_metrics.precision.toFixed(3) : '-';\n        }\n\n        // Update metrics table\n        this.updateMetricsTable(data.classes || []);\n\n        // Update charts\n tableBody.innerHTML = classes.map(cls => `\n            <tr>\n                <td><strong>${this.escapeHtml(cls.name)}</strong></td>\n                <td>${cls.total_gt_count || 0}</td>\n                <td>${cls.total_pred_count || 0}</td>\n                <td>${cls.tp_count || 0}</td>\n                <td>${cls.fp_count || 0}</td>\n                <td>${cls.fn_count || 0}</td>\n updateCharts(classes) {\n        if (classes.length === 0) return;\n\n        const labels = classes.map(cls => cls.name);\n        const recallData = classes.map(cls => cls.recall !== undefined ? cls.recall : 0);\n        const precisionData = classes.map(cls => cls.precision !== undefined ? cls.precision : 0);\n        const fprData = classes.map(cls => cls.fpr !== undefined ? cls.fpr : 0);\n\n        // Generate colors for each class\n        const colors = this.generateColors(classes.length);\n\n        // Update recall chart\n        this.createOrUpdateChart('recall-chart',       labels: labels,\n                datasets: [{\n                    label: label,\n                    data: data,\n                    backgroundColor: colors.map(c => c.background),\n                    borderColor: colors.map(c => c.border),\n                    borderWidth: 2\n                }]\n            },\n            options: {\n                responsive: true,\n [210, 150, 45, 0, 270, 180, 300, 330, 30, 60]; // Blue, green, orange, red, purple, cyan, magenta, pink, brown, yellow\n\n        for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n            const hue = baseHues[i (error) {\n            console.error('Error loading classes for filter:', error);\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateClassFilterDropdown() {\n        const classFilter = classFilter.remove(1);\n        }\n\n        // Add class options\n        this.allClasses.forEach(cls => {\n            const option = document.createElement('option');\n            option.value = cls.name;\n            option.textContent = cls.name;\n            classFilter.appendChild(option);\n        });\n    }\n\n    async loadImagesList() {\n        if (!this.datasetId) return;\n\n (this.filters.classFilter) {\n                url += `&class_filter=${encodeURIComponent(this.filters.classFilter)}`;\n            }\n\n            if (this.filters.statusFilter) {\n                url += `&status_filter=${encodeURIComponent(this.filters.statusFilter)}`;\n            }\n\n            const response = await fetch(url);\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n images list:', error);\n            const container = document.getElementById('image-list-container');\n            if (container) {\n                container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center [...this.allImages];\n\n        // Apply search filter (client-side)\n        if (this.filters.search) {\n            const searchTerm = this.filters.search.toLowerCase();\n            filteredImages = filteredImages.filter(image =>\n                image.filename.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm)\n            );\n        }\n\n        // Render filtered images\n        this.renderImagesList(filteredImages);\n    }\n\n    renderImagesList(images) {\n        const container = document.getElementById('image-list-container');\n        if (!container) return;\n\n        if (!images || images.length === 0) {\n            container.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-muted py-5\">No images found</div>';\n            return;\n        }\n\n        container.innerHTML = images.map(image => {\n            const statusClass = image.is_perfect ? 'status-perfect' : (image.has_fp || image.has_fn ? 'status-warning' : 'status-perfect');\n            return `\n                <div class=\"image-list-item\" data-image-id=\"${image.id}\">\n                    <img src=\"${image.thumbnail_path || ''}\" alt=\"${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}\" class=\"thumbnail\" onerror=\"this.src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%2260%22 height=%2260%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%23e2e8f0%22 width=%22100%25%22 height=%22100%25%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%2394a3b8%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22 dy=%22.3em%22%3E%3F%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E'\">\n                    <div class=\"image-info\">\n                        <div class=\"filename\">${this.escapeHtml(image.filename)}</div>\n                        <div class=\"image-stats\">\n                            GT: ${image.total_gt_boxes} | Pred: ${image.total_pred_boxes}\n                        </div>\n                    </div>\n                    <span class=\"status-dot ${statusClass}\" title=\"${image.is_perfect ? }\n\n        try {\n            const response = await fetch(`/api/images/${this.datasetId}/${imageId}`);\n            const data = await response.json();\n\n            if (data.success) {\n detailContent.innerHTML = '<div class=\"text-center text-danger py-5\">Failed to load image details</div>';\n            }\n        }\n    }\n\n    updateImageDetail(data) {\n        const
